Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was right next to talking elevator which went all night The corridor was really noisy Didn t sleep much No aircon Breakfast and wifi are exorbitantly priced   Room was clean and large Got free ferry voucher to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: staff were very hospitable and went out of their way to help Breakfast was also excellent with plenty to choose from The location was amazing could see all major london attractions from balcony at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our air conditioning was so cold in our room all night long we had to wear jumpers in bed Despite calling reception no one was able to fix it We weren t very happy customers

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Difficulty with the reservation on the name of my wife who did gave to cancel too high garater fee which wad blocking the credit card   Nice hotel with good service except for one male person at reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfasts are a rip off at 21 plus service Not good value And it s NOT in Canary Wharf fur those who don t know London It s a ferry ride away no good on very cold nights when your dressed for a black tie event

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Toilet kept blocking Floors creaky and bed Was gutted the balcony wasn t facing canary wharf Being pregnant it was a faf being in car park 2 I don t understand why we couldn t have had the code for the exit door Staff don t seem to know anything about car park 2 when asked questions Weren t told about wifi   Size of bed was Brill Boat times great Breakfast excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A nasty smell as you exited the lift and along to our room on fourth floor Didn t go away at all whilst we were there Think it is expensive   Evening meal and breakfast were very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Having requested particular rooms in both visits Only to be given something totally different All staff really friendly but reception didn t listen to to our request so both stays got off to a bad start Would stay again though  When we finally got the write room the view and location were excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff were terrible from start to finish Sour most unhelpful TVs not working or heating waited 30mins for someone to come fix it Enquiries about shows etc they hadn t a clue are horrible had to get Us underground train to London   Room was nice but no mattress cover on bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 1 I specified in my booking that my partner will be arriving after 12 hours of continuous travel so that they could do the fastest check in possible He arrived before me at 3 pm which is normal check in time and didn t settle till 8 pm because a The first room he got didn t look anything like the pictures we saw for the queen deluxe with river view There are 4 pictures of spacious rooms bathroom and we got the room in the 5th picture which was horrible It was very small almost feels like someone could choke in there This room should definitely not be in this category b My partner asked for a different room but couldn t communicate well as his English is medium level He speaks French and Arabic but no one spoke these languages although it says on the Booking com page we speak your language c We ended up getting a new room that looked exactly like the spacious ones we saw in the picture Yey But the air conditioning was on on COLD and it wouldn t turn off It was already freezing outside We asked for someone to fix it but we got a small electric heater instead d Once again we had to let go of the room we wanted and stayed in a Kings Deluxe room instead where all appliances were working fine But the room was as small as the first one My partner barely fit in the bathroom We lost the atmospheric room we were paying money for to enjoy If we wanted a room that size we could ve stayed somewhere else for cheaper There weren t any room slippers robes as well although we found some in the previous room 2 We found out that we couldn t order food and drinks to the room We didn t know as it wasn t mentioned on the booking profile This ruined the experience as well We expected to find a small refrigerator in the room instead but it wasn t there 3 On the day of our check out Sunday we woke up and didn t find hot water   1 The hot cookie we got when we checked out 2 The ferry service from the hotel to Canary Wharf 3 Friendly and patient staff 4 The food selection at breakfast was great and tasty We got complimentary breakfasts because of the stuff you read above

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bed was uncomfortable personal preference though Requested a river view and got dumped in the back which was very noisy with deliveries and what not Randomly got chargerd an extra 100 for no apparant reason Each night there seemed to be a function in the lounge so we never got to experience it   Breakfast was delicious Staff friendly Cocktails were lovely The view from the good part of the hotel was spectacular

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our room was very disappointing small and with an obstructed view nothing like the photo beware The upgrade we were given was better but smelt strongly of the cleaning cupboard next door Disgusting   Excellent receptionist who tried his hardest to meet our needs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Location On the other side of the river had to get a ferry to get to canary wharf Ferry was quick simple and free but added a bit of extra time to each journey that i wasnt expecting  Comfy bed excellent breakfast really helpful staff Overall a great stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I called a receptionist to the room at 1am because the heating was broke a member of staff came to the room and agreed it was broke who then said he would come back with some electric heaters Waited til 2am tried ringing reception no answer I told the member of staff when checking out she took my details and said she would investigate and see if she could get some compensation But i still haven t heard anything back from the hotel and will never be visiting again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Heating turned up a little more in rooms especially this time of year Or maybe i m a fussy thing   Staff we re very welcoming and helpful with locations etc Food was well cooked room service staff were lovely and the doubled drinks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bedroom location was noisy with people walking past alot and the bed was very rickety every time i turned in my sleep it made a noise and woke me up   It was very moder and clean The food and resturant was really good Very well greeted especially with a warm cookie when checking in which was pleasent and it was handy to have a boat service across to resturants

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: My partner and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the Doubletree by Hilton it was perfect from start to finish We will definetly be coming back The room was beautiful and the view was outstanding The staff could not be more helpful and were extremely friendly inparticulary a lady in the resteraunt who s name we unfortunately did not catch she has long brown hair and had such a friendly unique touch The complimentary ferry was also a bonus along with the scrumptious food served at breakfast Could not thank the staff any more for such a perfect stay all the best and we wish you a Merry Christmas

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The service i recieved from the staff I ordered room service then to be called back 10 minutes later saying i would have to go to reception to Then get home the day after my stay and they have charged me 40 for something i had not had It then took me 35 times to call to be hung up and lied to by Linda at the front desk who said they could make the refund and it would be in my acocunt immediately Then to be hung on by someone else Then eventually getting through to the manager and saying she couldnt do anything right then so i had to wait 1 hour for a phone call for her to say they was refunding me and it would be in my bank account the NEXT DAY That was on saturday and i am still waiting for the payment back This has ruined my stay and i would never recommend this hotel to anyone  the hotel is very nice looking

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was slightly chilly and couldn t work out how to turn on the heating Relied on shampoo included in the bathroom but not enough for a couple to shower  The breakfast included in our stay was absolutely lovely yummy food The bed was comfy and slept really well Lovely view from balcony

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: If there had been more leisure facilities for relaxation and pampering it would have been so much better   Wonderful location with the riverside looking amazing at night You are welcomed by a warm cookie on arrival which is a lovely touch Staff were extremely helpful and friendly and were quick to assist when we found our rooms were not warming up and the room phones were not working Awesome that a ferry trip across the river was included Fantastic breakfast too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: On the website there is a cocktail meny they apparantly doesn t have anyway Disapointing 24h roomservice is actually not 24h we were told   Columbia Restaurant food is awesome

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Thought the breakfast was overpriced we ate at Canada water  Bed was super comfy wonderful view of the Thames from balcony the room was comfortable and clean and modern A warm cookie on arrival was a nice touch Easy to get around the bus stops right outside the hotel straight to Canada Water for the underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We booked a deluxe king with a river view and we got a basement double room with no view because they were full The room was freezing and the heating and hot water didn t work inside the bath was patched up with mastic filling 2 holes and when we complained all we got was sorry but we are full we booked 9 weeks ago and would u like a free coffee   Nothing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: elevator too small for my son s wheelchair can not in international Hotel slow check in reception understaffed cold shower hard to find light switches in the rooms   nice location near river fine breakfast clean and spacious rooms helpful concierge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booked a deluxe double room with river view over a month ago to celebrate my husbands 60th birthday was given a dirty room with small unable to open window over looking buildings no river view staff weren t helpful at all even with all the signs saying if you not happy tell us had to really stand my ground even after being told that they were fully booked they would see if someone wanted to change The Hilton became more like Butlins such a shame as the hotel is lovely ferry across really well organised they need to sort out reservations asked over a month ago for a room with a balcony that didn t happen Not sure I would book again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Access on the weekends ferry stops at 9pm No hot water available in the mornings Over ambitious descriptions of the room particularly the river view   Views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: My toilet hadn t been cleaned and there was a UFO in it tried calling reception many times but no one answered Flushed it a lot but took the shine off of the stay   Enjoyed my free cookie and the free ferry to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We didn t have hot water on both mornings we were there It was reported to the reception team which they acknowledged and bar voucher given but really hot water is a must for a hotel stay Talking to other residents it seemed a common problem   Great location for Canary Wharf and O2 Lovely hotel with lovely restaurant and bar Ferry is very handy for link to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: staff could have been a little more helpful with giving us directions to locate our room we ended up going to reception twice with all our bags   river suite with balcony is very pretty at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location and the fact that the air conditioning was constantly on Our room was cold for a while before we were given a portable heater   The cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bar food menu was quite limited would have liked a couple more options  Location was good for the O2 used the hotel water taxi and clipper service which was really quick and easy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had several issues with staff being rude and or not knowing what their jobs were or what they should be doing   Complimentary Clipper trips across the Thames were good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The size of the queen guest room was ridiculously small it was definitely a double room and not a queen Also the cleaner walking in at 11 30am without warning and seeing me naked wasn t ideal   The complementary cookie on arrive was a lovely gesture

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Only thing I can fault is room not very warm even with temperature turned right up   Location decor breakfast complimentary ferry and staff excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the pillows were feather pillows and I couldn t get comfortable with them at all but I m sure if I asked they would have given me more   We got upgraded to a king room the room was clean and neat with an awesome view of the dock and Thames Loved the ferry boat The building itself is stunning and I couldn t get over the view was such a novelty

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booked a king deluxe room with a city or river view Room had neither Had to ask to change Second room had a better view but still not in line with the pictures seen when booking TV didn t face the bed it was on an arm but you still couldn t turn it round to face the bed Not a big deal as we weren t planning on watching it much but still not what you expect when you pay for a King Deluxe room Water was only just warm in the morning so not a great shower Website shows photos of a terrace bar but it turns out this is only available for group bookings   Bed was comfortable Breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I booked a smoking room on the net and when arrived said its s none smoking now and asked for room close to each other as booked 2 rooms one for my teenage daughters but had to pay for room up grade cause said none close so had to pay 25 to get rooms next to each other  I liked the room looked a little bigger on pictures tho and staff was friendly the boat trip is nice idea and view was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We came here to stay to celebrate our first wedding anniversary and was so disappointed the check in staff were lovely very welcoming but after that point it wasnt up to expectations The room was so small the bathroom wasn t the cleanest either looked slightly run down The TV lost signal every 5minutes Also had a constant high pitched noise going all night that kept us awake and the room walls were so thin every noice of talking walking past was heard very loudly heard another rooms tv going off till 2 30 am Other than disappointment of the room we went to check out restaurant bar and can not put in a good word at all the staff were so rude to the point we decided to eat elsewhere The attitude of the food and beverage staff that were serving on time of our stay really let it down We also skipped breakfast the next morning too to avoid the restaurant Such a shame as was looking forward to staying in hotel for meal and having few drinks with the beautiful view Overall very disappointed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When we arrived we were assigned a room Once we got to the room we found that it was still being made up by the facilities staff We mentioned this to reception who then replaced us into another room but with a less adequate view This shouldn t have been an issue in the first place and rooms should not be issued to guests until fully cleaned and tidied The floors were incredibly creepy and we were worried about waking other guests   The breakfast was unbelievable along with the view from the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Strange thing but the step threshold between the bedroom and bathroom was dangerously high and caused both of us to trip several times In the end we had to put a towel on the lower level of the bathroom floor to prevent accidents   Comfortable bed with crisp linen Fantastic breakfast range highly recommended Wonderful location on river with bonus of regular passenger ferry crossing to Canary Wharf and connection to the river bus service This facility gives hotel guests excellent access to a range of transport options including the underground at Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I didn t like the fact that my TV didn t work and it took the electrician THREE tries to fix it which resulted in me having to be moved If there is a problem staff members should move you regardless   We loved the free access to the ferry It was so nice to jump on the ferry at any time and see the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bath could have done with a little TLC Needed replacing really   Staff were very friendly Room was lovely Breakfast and dinner was superb Ferry crossing from hotel to Canary Wharf Pier was a blessing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Difficult to find not well signposted at all Ok with sat nav though   Quirky nice decor throughout and good views with some excellent decks overlooking the river Clean throughout and rooms ok for the price Good parking

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Wifi was not free and not working well in the room The hotel did not accept regular bank cards maestro for payment only credit cards  Location was good nice view from the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We stayed in Kingsroom I never stayed in Kings room before but thought it will be bigger bathroom is very small there is no room for two people there was power cut in our room in the morning Although it was resolved very quickly  It was such a nice touch to have a warm chocolate cookie with the room key Big thank you to the stuff as I asked tea coffee facility in the room View from the window was very nice especially in the evening when all canary wharf was illuminating complimentary ticket to the ferry to from canary wharf was very handy bed was fantastic Extra big and extra comfy it was absolutely perfect breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Corridor outside room smelt musty  lovely warm welcome at reception Rook with a balcony and river view quiet and very comfortable Excellent breakfast good choice and freshly cooked

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Long Queues for breakfast excellent staff there Location can be a problem and not easy to get there after a late night ferry stops at 12 Only two larger on draught and I wasn t fond of either Takes the best part of an hour to get home from Central London  Interesting rooms on Themes so great view Good breakfast Quiet Love the ferry Interesting part of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room was really small so we upgraded We had to check out of the more expensive room at 1 30am as there was a noisy radiator and we couldn t sleep There were no more rooms available and no maintenance so we had to get a cab home arriving home at 3am so we were very unhappy Still awaiting a refund for the room and breakfast that we obviously did not have   The view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff were useless Woman on reception took 20 minutes to check me in and gave me someone else s details as my own Bar was small and quiet Noisy room next to the river and smoke alarm kept going off for no reason at all Bed was noisy also   The room was lovely with brilliant view Big bed Breakfast tastes good but very small for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was much smaller than pictured expected The city view was only partial The costs weren t clear and we were charged an extra 50 deposit that they were in aware of in the morning I still don t think I got it back despite reminding them We had to walk through a woodland in the dark just to find it   The bed was amazing the breakfast and dinner was brilliant the staff are very helpful and pleasant The hotel itself is clean and very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Drinks were very pricey Probably just London prices though  Breakfasts were great Staff friendly and helpful Easy access to Canary Wharf and the river clippers and the fact the Doubletree ferry always waited for the last clipper to transport guests from Canary Wharf dock to the hotel Comfy rooms and beds Very clean hotel The terrace will be fabulous in the summer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was small for a Queen Size and the windows where really in need of replacement Heating in room was loud if turned on and 20 for breakfast is excessive wouldn t go again unless seriously discounted  Nice place staff friendly especially the transport support staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No mini fridge inside the room i consider mini fridge as basic comfort Very small room   It was clean and situated on the river the staff was friendly and they were organised with the ferry commuting tickets

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing  When greeted and checked into rooms it was all efficient and got given a hot cookie which made us feel welcome The view was beautiful from every Window and the rooms were lovely homely and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The shutters on the window rooms were really hot but opening the windows ment rattling   Great bar area to relax with friends and really nice food Nice touch with warm cookie on check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Good location for the City but not so good for Central London   Super confty bed free wi fi available friendly staff ready to help nice view complimentary tickets for the ferry nice breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Queue at breakfast  Hotel was beautiful staff very friendly gave us options of what room view we wanted Room was very comfortable Loved getting the ferry to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 1 Bed was extremely noisy 2 step in Bathroom although notice on wall still an issue in middle of night 3 Barrels were being moved from 7 00am Sat sun Monday disturbing sleep 4 Stayed in august breakfast was included in the price for a higher price breakfast wasn t included although my mistake for not checking reservation details   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I paid for a river view which I did not get due to heating not working in room my view ended up being scaffolding Waiting for another room made our whole evening late We missed our anniversary dinner in town Ended up having room services which we had to wait over an hour for Not the great anniversary gift I had planned for us I still feel really upset and disappointed   Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom was a little dated although spotlessly clean Free wifi didn t work in our room   The rooms and facilities were spotlessly clean Our hairdryer didn t work and after phoning housekeeping a replacement arrived in less than 5 minutes The beds were really comfortable and so were the pillows and duvet Free complimentary cookies on arrival were very tasty Breakfast was really good with plenty of choice from fish to cooked full English to cereals and fruit Easy access to the main attractions via C10 bus and Underground Hotel is close to an Odeon cinema and PizzaHut which was great to unwind after a busy day shopping

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Queuing to go in for breakfast when we finally got in the breakfast was v nice Seemed to take quite a while to get anywhere waiting for the ferry then a 15 min walk to any tube station So if you are wanting to get in to central London it can take quite a while   Rooms were spacious with balcony and view over the river staff allowed us to have a later check out as my daughter was ill

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room price we paid was the same as the executive room However our room was not up to scratch The tv didnt come out from a fixed position on the wall deeming it useless This was the only downpoint Other than that and the bad pricing it was okay Balcony room hardly worth the extra money especially without breakfast I would also recommend not checking out dead onn12 as gets very very busy or make sure you can express checkout

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I paid extra for a twin room I was staying with a male colleague in advance Despite that when I arrived the room we were given was a double bed We were re allocated another room but why did I have to waste time doing this and why did I have to pay extra   Location and comfort

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A wonderful hotel with great views from the bedroom and bar Amazing welcome with a warm cookie and free boat service The boat service was extremely convenient frequent and quick to get to the restaurants and bars with the last boat at midnight perfect Comfy bed excellent shower and great service Wonderful luxury stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff was ver rude didn t want to help me I asked for a heater because room was very cold they didn t bring it for me or took any notice and I cathed a cold now I have chest infection that I had to go hospital last night very bad service  Nothing at all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: some equipment in the room was old and didn t work The boat to reach the hotel is until midnight also in the weekend  The place and the position was good The view on the river very attractive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Restaurant closes to early we was turned away at 9 30pm  Loved everything about the hotel we was in a king suite room 686 and it was awesome lovely veiws also

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fire alarm system went off 7 times during the night apparently due to a fire a few miles away and the smoke affecting the system The system kept picking up smoke and going off again Quite unsettling and ended up in the lobby at 4am until 5am until we felt confident that all was ok Very little sleep due to this problem which meant I felt exhausted the next day at my Conference   The trip across the water was enjoyable and different The room whilst small was comfortable very clean the shower lovely and hot and the toiletry products were good quality The food and service in the restaurant was very good friendly warm good quality food and variety of menu I was struggling with foot blisters the staff kindly gave me huge plasters which saved the day

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were greeted with a freshly made hotel chocolate cookie which was a lovely touch Great nights sleep with comfy bed and pillows Lovely view out of our room window Very efficient ferry ride to Canary Wharf and friendly staff onboard Delicious breakfast and lots of options Staff were very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Beds comfy location was excellent definatly recommend I went with children and was perfect for them Room was big and had a lovely view of the Thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fire alarm went off several times during the night finally becoming an urgent continuous bell at 4 00am As a permanent wheelchair user I had been given instructions to stay in my room if the alarm sounded and a member of staff would come and get me This did not happen we could not get a reply from any phone number so my wife had to get me up and dressed not easy I need to use a hoist to get in out of bed We went to reception where chaos reigned full of guests in various states of dress A member of staff in a hi viz jacket was explaining the situation to one couple saying he would speak to everyone individually I interrupted him to suggest that he made an announcement so that everyone could go back to bed which he then did It was clearly ridiculous that it took me to suggest this and my wife was very distressed that Hilton had not followed their own instructions and notified us that we were either safe or unsafe in our room The following morning all the guests looked very worse for wear we saw one man leave at 4 in the morning he couldn t take it anymore obviously however Edward Loader Head of Operations spoke to me at length and said that he would waive the cost of our room for the dreadful night a gesture I appreciate   Good location nice room friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very disappointed with our room it had a smell from bathroom drains I didn t like that we couldn t see out of window made it feel I was sleeping in a bathroom It had opaque glass on window Felt clostrophobic  It had a lovely lobby and liked the peir to and from hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff at the front desk were very rude everytime we asked something they looked at us as though we didn t belong there Balcony was very dirty not representative of the pictures online Room was much smaller than expected

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The time you can get alcohol from the executive lounge was a bit short 2hours only   The location was perfect the breakfast was superb the staff were nice and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The balcony is fab for smokers Loved that the hotel is on the River Thames so one can get there via water taxis boats provided by hotel from any pier wharf on the Thames Very nice breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Went for drink in the bar service was slow had to wait quite a while  The bed was extra comfy pillows were soft room value for money The bathroom was a little on the small side shower was lovely breakfast was great plenty of choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Internet connection wasnt good Bar staff not very friendly seems like tgey are not valued Could do with better stock for red wine all i had choice of for red wine was to buy a bottle or a glass of shiraz they werent willing to offer to open a bottle to compensate they had no other choice by the glass not very good No drinking water in room  Nice clean comfortable room and bathroom Was given a riverside view on request Access 24hrs Woukd definateley stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room nice and big and very comfy bed Front desk lady that checked us in was very friendly and helpful with a lovely smile Loved the welcome cookie too and very nice to have a courtesy ferry to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff were not helpful at all bar staff were rude when asked a simple question Concierge were not helpful didn t advise directions when getting car from car park also didn t advise of the pre authorisation 50 off my card just in case we had any extras We didn t and am still waiting for this transaction to be cancelled Certainly should NEVER do this without speaking to the customer first so it can be expected   Location was good for some but not for what we wanted to do but that was our error

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our bedroom was small felt claustrophobic at times Bathroom was also small and the hand basin was miniature Pictures on the website make the rooms look much bigger   Location was excellent Bed was very comfy Great river view Loved having the ferry on the doorstep so access to Canary Wharf was so easy and a real pleasure

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 15 for WiFi in the room is crazy  Stayed in room 335 amazing views I ve stayed in some of Londons top hotels and this was up there with the best really will struggle to top this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room wasn t as advertised no balcony staff with bad knowledge of underground stations meaning a longer than expected walk back to the hotel room noise from pipes the quilt looked like it was designed for the Arctic   Hotel bar and resteraunt

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We booked and paid 3 weeks before our trip to get there and to be told there were no quuen rooms available we then had to pay another 30 to upgrade to a different room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: our view from our room was a little dissapointing as i would have liked a thames view but we could only just see it from our balcony if we were leaning  The staff were extremely accomodating as i have an allergy to feathers and all the bedding was feather based but when i told the staff they changed all the bedding immediatley for me Breakfast was amazing and lots of lovely choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was tiny with double bed up against the wall one side nothing like shown on the website Hardly room to sit on the loo with loo roll sticking in your side Woken early 6 45am by cleaner hitting radiators and pipes outside the room for nearly an hour Worst 4 hotel I have ever stayed in Same applied to my colleague Complained at reception didn t even get offered a discount

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The TV in the room wasn t in a good viewing position from the bed Not sure if had a movable tv arm wasn t notified and didn t try to move tele incase broke Also little things like the cookie which should recieve on arrival didn t actually recieve it just little things to dampen what was actually a good stay   Breakfast was good Fried eggs needed to be cooked more though Some staff member didn t know what a fork was

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 2nd visit love the hotel and the room was good Service was not up to our last visit We used to love sitting outside and eating and drinking but there were not many comfy seats they were geared up for outside dining and no one came to take our orders

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had booked for two nights and we were on the top floor the room keys were deactivated so we had to come back twice to the reception to reactivate the key cards plus the lift nearest to our room was out of order  Overall the hotel was comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: WiFi very poor and no signal in hotel via service provider Booked a superior king room but I have no idea what was superior about it Hotel is overpriced and on the wrong side of the river for O2 but is advertised as close by No night room service and is in the middle of a residential site but no shops Definitely wouldn t stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were attending a wedding nearby on this occasion and so my requests of the hotel were a bit more critical than usual particularly early check in so that we could change in preparation for the wedding At check in approx 2pm I was told that early check in was not available The receptionist s response to my suggestion that they should at least have communicated this to me ahead of arrival was that they had no record of any of my requests I have been using Booking com for many years and this is the first time that has been claimed I am inclined to doubt the accuracy of that statement therefore Thus very poor service from a four star hotel   Large hotel originally I believe an old warehouse but an impressive modern conversion Big plus is on site car parking at not unreasonable cost for London 12 from memory I think Generous size bedroom although the en suite was compact to say the least everything was in there though so no complaint overall

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Didn t like being stuck on the fourth 4 in what was effectively an after thought of a room The window was opaque and as for the bed I have never ever slept in a bed that made so much noise and I m talking about attempting to get comfortable and sleeping   Fabulous views over the Thames clean pleasant atmosphere helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The view from the hotel deck is amazing and it s super easy to move around There is a bus station in front of the hotel and a ferry inside the hotel The neighborhood is very nice and safe

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Corridors and shared areas very tired Cleaning left in corridors Food trays left in corridors  Nice room although damp bathroom Nice bar but service could improve when busy Great location for Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When we booked it said our room had a view of the river but it didn t   The location was perfect It was lovely popping across to Canary Wharf on the ferry to all the restaurants

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rooms were big The location is beautiful view of Canary Wharf on one side and short walk down the dockside you can see London city scape of the Shard and other buildings There is close transport links to the underground on a coupe minutes by bus and a river ferry to Canary Wharf to the river bus or underground and over ground links

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: My bedroom was on the ground floor beside a car park and I could hear people talking right outside my window It was only for about 10 minutes so it didn t bother me but I wouldn t have liked it had it gone on for longer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rude unhelpful night staff Terrible room smelt of urine and was like someone s attic No gym and fitness facilities Go to the one in canary wharf it s so much better Room service don t bother answering calls   Day staff were helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Manager was extremely rude Tried calling reception from my room for 30mins no one answered tried again off mobile no answer went downstairs to complain and was told we are busy can t you see the phone are still ringing Room was not ready at check in time Had to queue twice to check in and get parking sorted waited 20mins to start with when checking in Mentioned at time of booking was a 10 yr anniversary Hotel didn t seem to care Junior suite room with balcony is a rip off You pay for the view only Exec king or exec queen rooms are cheaper but there balconites are double the size and also with the same view Does not make sense Wonderful way to ruin a 10yr anniversary didn t have breakfast because just wanted to leave hotel first thing in the morning   Bed was comfy View was lovely especially at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Dirty toilet in room had been used Long wait for dinner to be served in the bar Too many steps and no help from staff watching you carry suit cases up the stairs from the car park or from bar to reception No plugs by bedside for charging phones  Breakfast was good amazing chef Good bar food menu Beautiful location by the thames Complimentary river ferry taxi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The service in the restaurant was awful I had to collect my own food from the serving area as there were little or no waiters available Hilton you need to staff your facilities better   River bus great to get to Canary Wharf and restaurants and free for hotel guests

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had pre booked a room only to get there find it had been given to someone else Then told they didn t have a similar room available which we refused to accept Got given a room as we opened the door walked in on someone already staying in that room Fuming at this stage we were given a twin room which was nothing like the room described or paid for Not a good experience Staff very unhelpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Not being offered the special offer in the restaurant at night My husband had seen the offer on check in and had to go back to reception to ask for a voucher and then get the different menu   The decor of the room bathroom and the view from the balcony The ferry across to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very disappointing customer service and most importantly our room couldn t of been any more different to the photos online certainly not worth the money we paid

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was noisy and not comfortable We stayed in room 150 If ever offered this room turn it down The constant sound of the boiler with a combination of the lift going up and down in addition to the noisy bed kept me awake all night Thank god check out was 12 00pm as I didn t get to sleep until 5am I did complain at the point of check out and was provided with an email address advising me to contact the member of staff for the purpose of an upgrade next time NO THANKS   Staff were lovely and helpful The boat across the Thames was also a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast was poor compared to other Hilton hotels I ve stayed in Over cooked hash and under cooked scrambled eggs Choice of continental pastries made up for this though Bed was an old fashioned Spring bed but ok for our one night if you don t mind noisy springs Good pub a few hundred yards from hotel   Loved the free ferry and the bar area Would return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Expensive food poor for the price no water dispenser and water from bar v expensive standard was no better than premier inn which is much cheaper   Comfy bed modern bathroom cookie on arrival ferry to connect with Thames clipper

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We was in room 148 We was kept awake most of the night with a buzzing vibrating noise coming from a room next to us I think it was some kind of a boiler room but we was not happy with this There was an open window to this room on our balcony which when we had door open was even worse

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room temperature air con heating is hard to figure out so we were a little bit cold   This place was better than other places we have stayed in and paid more for Just under 200 this suite was luxury We have been here before which is why we decided to come back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location is far out from the city if you arrive late in after mid night the ferry is no longer running so you have to walk a distance to the hotel or take a taxi The photos on the website is way better than the actual hotel view and location   Facilities are good and staff are very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It s quite expensive in the hotel for food and drinks  The view is wonderful the rooms are very modern and provided with everything you need iron board hairdryer everything you need I also liked that you could go on the boat to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Sometimes we felt too removed from the city We got inaccurate directions twice from two different staff members They were certainly kind and helpful but if they didn t know where they were going they should find someone who does   This hotel is away from the bustle on London clean and comfortable We loved that our room had a view of the Thames city lights The frequent complimentry ferry service to Canary Wharf made traveling to London sights easy and fun Breakfast in the restaurant was wonderful and our son ate free

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room service messed up my order but not too bad Paying 5 00 room service was a bit harsh when they messed up the drinks but I paid it anyway  Suite was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The beds were rock hard My neck and back became very sore and stiff I slept poorly and when I slept on the second night I woke with numb hands This is not normal for me   Loved the location on the river and the free ferry tickets Loved the warehouse brick and the look of the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Location is great but if you don t get back before midnight then you can t use the ferry to cross the river and understanding the us system from Canada Waters from non bus users is a bit tricky so walked Room was very small and while cheaper on the deal compared to travel lodge and premier inn the room is half the size   Over nice clean hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Comfortable bed nice room good location though last ferry at midnight on a weekend could be a problem for some we had to get from Wembley Breakfast was excellent All staff were friendly and competent The location gave us a chance to explore a different part of London Canary Wharf lots of shops bars and eating places The Docklands Museum is really interesting and well laid out free entry

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast was good but extremely chaotic people were losing their tables when they went up to get food and there were not enough waiting staff to monitor this   Really comfortable room Loved the warm cookie on arrival lovely touch Beautiful location breakfast with a view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I called from the airport to ask for directions to the hotel They told me they didnt really know they transferred me somewhere and nobody picked the phone Considering the roaming cost it was a waste of money I had mentioned in the booking that I was taking my daughter to London as a birthday gift I expected some kind of special attention or at least saying happy birthday to her but none of it happened Getting some food at the bad took ages Bad location if you want to do sightseeing The closest station is quite far   Breakfast was great and the hotel is really nicely arranged Welcome cookie was a great surprise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Check in was below standard   Large Rooms and well located for transport by ferry tube and bus Using the Coffee kiosk located near reception with good coffee and pastries fruit salad etc saved a lot on the cost of breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bar staff not very organised I m afraid They seemed stressed and understaffed   The location is great if you want to experience the quiet of London and yet you can get into the thick of it by taking the boat into central london Canary Wharf is the river ferry away The breakfast is the best

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The price was nothing short of extortion 250 per night not including breakfast and that was for the worst room was a complete rip off and I expected more the TV wasn t working for the Manchester Darby the building is worn and like a rabbit warren I feel proper ripped off   The bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Lower the price and rating as this hotel does not meet the standard it is priced at   Hotel was looking tired in decor Room was small for a deluxe Lifts were tiny Not worth the money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first impression of your room is at the door The doors on our floor all had old screw holes in evidence and different coloured wood where the old room sign had been removed The Hotel needs modernising Whilst the ferry service was very good to the Hotel the extra step was an inconvenience at times Gym equipment needs regular servicing as some was damaged and unusable Complimentary water in the room would have been appreciated for each day of the stay and not just the day of arrival   The night time view from our riverside room was spectacular looking out onto Canary Wharf Good choice for breakfast The outside sitting area was lovely with views across the Thames The regular ferry service was very good to the Hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: room was very small windows didn t open awkward step from bathroom to room which we kept tripping over TV was in a awkward position not facing the bed but facing the wall had to wait a very long time to be seated for breakfast then there were not any clean plates for the hot food so we had to wait longer for them to get clean ones  great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We did not get the room promised a number of the amenities were not in the room Walk in shower fridge etc I was made a special request that was not actioned Plus we ordered room service and asked to pay by card when the staff member arrived he said we could not pay by card I had to walk all the way back to to the front of the hotel to use an ATM woeful   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rooms wasn t that great bedding isn t nice No facilities close by the by water when Costa is closed 50 deposit even though the cost of stay is already paid taken Informed that money goes straight back into account and it does not   The pizza

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: rubbish air con local kids knocking around undesirable rooms And bad location terrible staff  Breakfast receptionist and one of the bar staff were pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I was very put off by the general state of the room The throw blanket was stained and really dirty Bathroom smelled of mold Too much light in the morning thru the curtains   Nice location on the Riverside complimentary ferry service connecting to Canary Wharf Included breakfast was very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No mini bar AND no bottled water available I think that is retrograde especially as you classify the room as superior Whilst there was an empty ice bucket in the room there weren t obvious instructions how to obtain the ice   Excellent bed with reasonable pillows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very loud room 236 in the evening and through into the early hours of the morning music from the bar downstairs   Excellent location and decor Very friendly and competent staff at check in Stunning views from the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I had booked a queen full river facing suite but was given a side room even though it was a king suite When I complained I was first told they couldn t change but when I told them that I had specifically booked the queen suite and showed them the booking confirmation they finally relented Not the kind of welcome you expect to receive at a Hilton hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The reception staff are rude and this thing of charging a extra 50 security deposit on arrival is insulting and insinuating the guest is dishonest Booking com should tell us this charge is policy prior to booking   The river view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I don t like the service charge being added to the drinks bills The drinks are already expensive enough 4 for a green tea It s a tea bag with hot water for goodness sake   This is a really well kept comfortable hotel Staff are pleasant there s some nice subtle touches and it was fairly priced

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The stairs outside being spiral shape as I only go in lifts However that s being fusy   The breakfast in the morning was lovely And the fery is a brilliant idea made good use of it to get to all the reastraunts and bars on the other side of the river and it s free to use Room was nice and big with the Beauitful river view Staff were all welcoming and lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I booked a 2 night stay Never like the ground room I was placed in on arrival But this was fairly resolved for my next day stay with a king size suite complemented by the manager   I liked the rooms on the upper level

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room we had was very small and dark but the give us a better one The pier was nor really confortable if you are travelling with luggage Beati  The views and the ubication are great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I noticed that for people arriving for a late breakfast about 9 30 there was an extremely long queue fortunately we had had ours   The quiet breakfast area behind the main area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When we were given the keys to the room at 5pm we found that the room had not been cleaned so was given another room which was not what we booked no view and a very small window found the room very hot even though there was air conditioning   The hotel was very comfortable and the breakfast very good but restaurant can be busy if going down later

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room service sandwiches like supermarket or petrol station ones Room service brought a glass of flat Prosecco and said it was just open Rooms advertised with balcony not worth having no view and no seating Incredibly you only get free bottled water on the first night it cost them 10p Asked for milk but non turned up so no water or tea or coffee in the morning Takes ages for anyone to answer the phone reception or room service Ask to speak to manager but he did not phone back Apart from the staff on reception and one or two in the breakfast area the other staff had no idea what they were talking about  The reception staff the breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very badly organised when it came to breakfast The hotel was very busy but having to stand in a queue at the breakfast counter for over 20 minutes was less than satisfactory Also the family room that our friends had booked was not ready on our arrival at 5 30pm and they were told they would have to wait until at least 7pm before the room would be ready   The location and the view from the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast service  Whilst the food was good the queue to be served was horrendous the result of only one poor chef cooking and serving it was a disgrace

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fire alarm system was set off 3 times so a very sleepless night for us   The room was spacious and modern and we had a view of the city and the river which was great We loved the bar with outside seatingLoved the ferry to and from Docklands a nice little novelty

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff were abrupt at the restaurant when asked for food at 10 30 and said food had stopped being served but the website said until 11pm The restaurant didn t suggest getting food at the bar Had to pay a 50 deposit for the room per night hopefully this will be refunded soon The car park at garage 2 is strange there is no way down to the car park direct from the hotel you have to use the car entrance to access your car and walk across the car park   I liked that you got compilmentary ferry passes to cross the Thames I liked the Costa coffee in house down stairs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: had a really small issue with the room took a little while to get hold of someone to get it fixed especially as it only took a couple of minutes to fix   Awesome breakfast really friendly and helpful staff Thought the room and bathroom would be a bit bigger on the small size especially the bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location wasn t great and no little gift shops or anything like that would have stayed longer if prices were abit cheaper food prices were rediculous  The views were amazing and restaurant staff were so lovley

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Fire alarm went off twice at night with the only explanation being a fault Staff did not once ask if I had a good stay even on checkout No info given on check in like restaurant here bar there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No free wifi Breakfast service chaotic and unorganised as had to continuously ask for and fetch items myself   Bed nice and comfy Reception gave Hilton made cookies which tasted great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The balcony door needs oiling Very creaky TV needs a bigger wall mount on it so it can swing out to face to bed properly Might apply only to some rooms also arrive later than 3 They seem to struggle having the rooms ready in the time frame they give The adjoining dinning company not so great Employees seemed stressed and come off a bit rude Also very very busy in the morning Other than that place was great   Very good rooms Lovely bathrooms Nice views Great area Nice and peaceful Free boat trips to canary and complementary cookie when u arrive Respectful staff in the hotel part Very clean and we ll maintained Elevator broke and got repaired the same day Staff are very helpful and are about 24 hours a day The area is connected to a walkway along the riverside Looks great at night i recommend this

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very disappointed we arrived at 6 15pm and our room wasn t ready The check in staff couldn t tell us when it would be ready Had no where to shower or get ready properly for our night out we stayed over the weekend for a special birthday meal Also breakfast was very badly managed Huge queue for the hot meal had to queue for ages didn t go down at all Hotel couldn t cope with being full Wasn t a good experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Was a really hot weekend and unfortunately the air con didn t seem to be cooling the room much so was very stuffy Also where the large mirror in the room was there was no light so couldn t see much   Very comfy bed and enjoyed the warm chocolate cookie on arrival Ideal to have the ferry across the river too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No bath slip pad for our friends room We had one Staff at the tour information need more training for visitors   Location was good Elevators were a little small

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had breakfest only one morning only one of us and was charged for several days Not right   Everone was very nice and helpfull made our stay very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Poor room initially but then moved to a nicer room as requested room with a view Some staff unhelpful broken air con However attentive staff when complained and compensated for next stay due to issues   Comfy bed and nice views Nice breakfast plenty of choice Riverboat to Canary Wharf service great nice boat staff Wine and cake sent to room to congratulate us on our anniversary which was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff at the bar were slow rude The fire alarm went off 3 times during the night meaning we were very tired for our onward travel the following day   Great hotel excellent rooms loved the ferry service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were not able to access our room until 16 45 but the reception staff did offer free drinks etc by way of apology   Stunning location beautiful hotel Breakfast was amazing with everything you could think of The staff were friendly rooms were clean and the beds were very comfortable We had an amazing river view balcony the view from our room room 441 at night was beautiful The only negative I had was the check in we were supposed to be able to check in at 15 00 but our was not ready until 16 45 this was a bit of a let down but we were given2 lots of drinks vouchers and later that evening a complimentary fruit bowl and drinks I would definitely book this hotel again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: At arrival somebody used the toilet in our room and didn t flush Awfull Terrible We ve never experienced this in our livetimes We got offered an other room in which you could not see tv from in your bed Oubviously there was a smaller tv before and now there was a bigger one which was hanging in an angle but the arm was fit for the small tv not for the big one You couldn t turn the tv in full Pffff No tv in the evening   Breakfast was marvelous 3 times hurray Marvelous friendly helpfull beautifull staff Frances and the breakfast team Job more than WELL DONE

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Views over the Thames were beautiful The complimentary ferry across the Thames was incredibly useful The staff were very nice and the breakfast superb

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Pillows too soft Also in the rooms some lights were not working so it would be good that your housekeeping checks these ahead Provide a small fridge so we can store stuff for our snacks cold drinks tks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Arrived in the hotel in the morning to leave some bags I asked them if they have my details as I booked my room a couple of weeks back via booking com but they said my name was not on the system even when I showed them my confirmation email They assured me that they will fix it but when we came back at night to check in they still said I wasn t on the system Then I heard another person complaining because she was in the same situation as me

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was quite a long wait at the breakfast area But that was it Certainly nothing that would stop me coming back The bottled water was expensive too   The beds were so comfy the staff were brilliant food was great and it was very cheap The location is amazing too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Paid for a deluxe King room with balcony but the room was small and there were no chairs on the balcony so we couldn t sit out there Also it overlooked a car park and tennis courts should have booked a river view room The housekeeping staff knocked on our door twice way before check out time 12 00 asking what time we were leaving so we felt rushed to get out the room When I booked the room it said breakfast included but when I checked in we were told it was not The tv in the room was on a wall next to the bed and it wasn t on hinges so we had to lay side ways on the bed to watch it bit strange   The hotel was in a perfect location with the complimentary ferry over to Canary Wharf until 12 at night very handy to go for drinks in the city The bed was so comfortable and big We couldn t hear any noise from other guests in the hotel which was great as this is usually a problem in big hotels We had dinner in the Columbia restaurant which was amazing and really good value for money the bar was lovely too and it wasn t too expensive for drinks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was so small and very claustrophobic View was in to next room and i could of crawlled in to their room and vice verca as the locks were broke on window Noisy at night Will not be staying again awful   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff on the reception desk are polite but painfully slow We were initially allocated a room that bore no resemblance to the description on booking com We returned to reception to be greeted yet again with a long queue too few staff and another painful wait Finally we were given another room slightly better but it didn t match the criteria that we d booked This whole situation had taken far too long We were due at another appointment for a very specific time and were late The reception desk is the front line they should be reassuring alert and quick the staff here at Doubletree Docklands are non of these We have stayed at other Doubletree Hotels and had a wonderful experience and that s why we chose this one Think very carefully about booking this hotel it s nowhere near the standard of the others   The best bit about this hotel was checking out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom felt a little tired the grouting was extremely discoloured and whilst I m sure this is down to age it made the bathroom feel slightly unclean The bedding also smelt slightly damp   The view from the room was lovely The bed was comfortable and the breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The persons at the front desk were all very helpful and nice The location is ideal for making a short trip to Greenwich on the river on the sunny day as well as is convenient for both the underground and DLR The hotel ferry across the river run frequently so the access to Canary Wharf was good Enjoyed the breakfast with the view of a heron and seagulls

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Location is challenging if weather is not great as you need to pay for a cab or get a boat across the river and walk 10 minutes for the tube Breakfast was below average and the building needs some TLC Our room at first was a box looking at other people s window so you must fight for the right one You don t get necessarily what the photos shows   Views from the bedroom IF you get a decent one Comfy bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Long queues to check in Someone elses underwear in drawers No answer on careline Room Temp control not working Big leak outside room Had to visit reception x3 to get TV remote that worked Costa coffee bar not open as advertised  cookies Free ferry Room decor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Could hear people in corridor when room door was shut   Decent room size Breakfast staff were VERY friendly and professional Decoration style nice Good location for public transport

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing the deal was really great   The amazing location for a business trip and the way they made it convenient for leisure travellers too I think going there for vacations must be great as well due to the shuttle boat and the excellent connection with Canary Wharf Jubilee line Also a special mention for the restaurant and the sunny terrace from which one can get wifi an AMAZING spot to work while enjoying the weather the waves on the Thames river and the view over Canary Wharf I m used to staying at Hilton and DoubleTree especially but this one was a very good surprise I d stayed once a couple of years ago but it was winter and I couldn t enjoy the whole facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Better notification of having to get a boat across to the hotel Didn t cause a problem for us but did add time on to our journey times   Breakfast was good We were in a nice quiet part of the hotel comfortable room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: That I have paid for breakfast online but wasn t included upon arrival Pre pay 50 upon arrival incase of damages wasn t notified when booking only told when checking in with it taking 2 3 working days to be put into your bank   The view was amazing from every angle of the hotel Our room King deluxe was very clean and well kept Bar had lots of variation Hotel staff were friendly and helpful Unique experience different side has been seen to London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the queue for breakfast was huge but nothing we couldn t handle and the bar was a bit pricey  the rooms were lovely with brilliant rooms and the location was excellent for our plans the free ferry service was excellent and we will definitely be returning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: AC didn t hold out well 34c in London during stay   Buffet overlooking Thames a great way to start the day Location was quiet with easy access to transit

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I had contacted both the hotel and used the chat option on the Hilton website as I am a photographer and required uninterrupted views of Canary Wharf Both recommended the same room so that s what I booked however the only way to get a view of Canary wharf was to stand on tip toe and hang out of the window Thankfully there is an outside area that I could use for taking pictures but if the weather had been bad this would not have been possible Not the view I was promised by reception or the person on chat The staff seemed to lack training subsequently some were great and others were unsure of pretty much everything In some cases the bar for example the staff were good but way to stretched which did not help them or the customers   The hotel looked good nice room lovely touch with the cookie when you arrive Some of the staff were extremely good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff were rude from start to finish we were checked into our room late after emails months in advance about early check which was great after a 4am flight My wife fell asleep in the lobby she was so exhausted Multiple people were checked in ahead of us and all they could say was its not ready No apology or niceties were given My wife and I were both ignored in the bar more than once to the point were we just left Horrible experience and we won t be back I wouldn t even give 1 star considering how expensive the room was I have stayed in hostels and had a better experience for 13 pound a night not 110 Oh and they also tried to charge us extra for the room claiming that this was their policy even though the price on booking com was final

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The TV didn t work and I queued 3 separate occasions for over 25 mins Wasted time especially when we had things planned to do and panicked about doing them and arriving on time Not good   The view from the room was incredible

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The electricity cut out TWICE in our room That doesn t even happen in a 1star hotel Not happy Manager tried to bribe us with a free 60 breakfast who the hell pays 60 for breakfast Room layout was ridiculous The door just missed the bed when opened Bathroom smelt like damp They refunded me 50 after complaining twice which I was still not happy to pay but I had had enough by then and just wanted to leave Would not stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Terrible parking which we were charged twice for then had to carry our cases up two flights of stairs to reception Long queues for checking in checking out breakfast Rude hotel staff housekeeping supervisor barged in our room whithout knocking telling us we shouldn t be in the room then after nearly an hour of waiting not knowing what was going on we were told we could stay in the room Paid extra for a bigger room with balcony and river city view but the room still felt cramped and the bathroom was tiny the door hit the loo when you opened it and there was barely a square foot to stand in the whole bathroom As for the balcony with view the river city could only be seen if you stood right at the edge of the balcony and stretched your neck right over and round Poor quality breakfast bacon was more fat than meat and the rest was tasteless When I tried to complain whilst checking out I was shot down and ushered off as quickly as possible Real let down expected a lot more from this hotel   Good location free ferry over to Canary Wharf for hotel guests

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Oh dear We arrived early during the day and from the way we were received and welcomed I thought this was going to be an amazing stay Unfortunately I would be sorely disappointed The service I received from the night staff was the worst I have ever seen and received and for the last 18 months I spent at the very least 5 to 10 days a month in a hotel I thought I seen it all First night having requested before my arrival foam bedding through Hilton Honors my wife s allergic feather down as silver status member I am apparently entitled to this but alas I didn t find any I tried to call and left the phone on speaker for a good 15 minutes before I hung up I tried another number that they made available apparently this number was supposed to make your stay better and no answer again Then I had to trek five floors down through a maze of rooms on the ground floor you have to see how poor the floor layout is to appreciate the strain and when I finally got to reception guy told me they never answer their phones on weekends because the phones are serviced He also told me it would be impossible to get any foam bedding because he could not leave the front desk because pointing at the queues of people behind me I returned my wife removed all the bedding and we were prepared to sleep on a naked bed when bless his soul he managed to give us one paltry foam pillow The next day when I went downstairs and reported the lack of foam bedding Maria was amazing she apologised for the inconveniences and assured that the matter would be resolved without any hassle and she kept her promise I thought ok perhaps dude from the night before had a bad day hey I worked in customer services for many years in many ways as a government official I still do so I know you cant always have your A game on when it comes to customers I forgave him and Doubletree   The day staff the location were great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I didn t like how long you had to wait for breakfast It took about 15mins before we were seated But the food was very nice   The beds are very cosy and the shower was brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Queuing for 45 minutes to check in with nobody explaining why it was taking so long and it was very unwelcoming When we came down 25 minutes later there was still a queue The tv in the room was in an awkward position When we arrived back on Saturday evening there was nowhere to sit in the bar so we went outside only to be told that the area was closed so we went to bed Breakfast was disorganised though I had spoken to the kitchen about gluten free toast when it arrived it the bread hadn t been toasted and the waiter suggested we put it in the ordinary toaster When we checked out the receptionist didn t even ask if we had had a good stay Definitely won t be coming back   The bed was comfortable and the free ferry service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Cleanliness of rooms one room had a filthy bath that we had to call housekeeping up to sort out the other room was left for us with a very smelly used and unflushed toilet The bar prices were high but the bar service was a disgrace Not what we expected from the Hilton group  Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast was joke the queues for getting in and the queues for getting your breakfast having to borrow source From other tables no hot water to make a cup of tea no orange juice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
