Full_Review: Too many people for breakfast dining room and cook station couldn t cope Both mornings has to queue out side restaurant and wait for table On Sunday morning when we were at the cook station waiting twice our table was cleared as if we had left Very unorganised   Lovely terrace on the side of the river very well furnished

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No biscuits in the room to have with my tea  The hotel was very clean and the surrounding area was clean as well The staff were very professional One person in particular is a asset to the hotel I do not know her name she worked in the bar Saturday afternoon

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were given a single occupancy room in error but the hotel was sold out so had no choice but to stay there The room was tiny The bed was tiny and it had the quality of furniture you would expect in a hostel not a 4 hotel Took 35 minutes just to check in Restaurant lost our reservation   Nothing the entire experience was a shambles

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booked a King size bed got two uneven twin mattresses pushed together Staff overwhelmed at front desk waited over an hour for assistance before giving up

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Check in reception inefficiency   Check in shocking I went early prior to my brothers and sister in law check in to make sure everything would run smoothly Staff chaotic Need training to deal quickly and efficiently with one customer at a time and not be distracted by other staffs requests When my brother did check in they unable to find the booking until I gave the member of staffs name I had spoken to earlier in the day

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bath was filthy room was next to a lift which vibrated the walls everytime it went past Couldn t cater for the guests had to wait almost 35 mins for some of the breakfast to be available   Rooms were nice food was nice location was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Extra net needed over balcony door so you could have more privacy as being looked over by people opposite  That the staff were very helpful added bonus we got upgraded

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Some staff were a little abrupt and rude but I understand this has a lot to do with their poor English The breakfast was appalling cold lack of choice tasteless and very very untidy with lack of cutlery and crockery   Balcony looking onto the Thames We initially thought the ferry to and from the hotel would be a bit cumbersome but it was a novelty and very reliable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Unexpected charge on my credit card Room had French windows opening to fire escape balcony accessible by other guests Could not keep the door open at night   Staff were friendly and breakfast abundant Free ferry to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A small size room with a normal size bed does not make our room a deluxe executive queen suit I felt I was misled pictures of room discription no not match will not book here again WiFi hit miss no hot water for 1night the next day  Decking area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast could have been better It should have been 23 and I certainly wouldn t have paid that for a buffet breakfast Grumbled at 16 95 It was cold and I certainly want waiting on for that money not having to collect my own tea and make my own toast or have to queue for it But the hotel made it right so I am pleased with the outcome   The staff were excellent Parking facilities excellent complimentary service to Canary Wharf was also excellent Room was clean and tidy Our overall staff was excellent will be staying again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I planned the nights stay here as a surprise for my boyfriend It was supposed to be a luxury getaway based on the amount I paid I booked a table ahead of schedule and the only time available which was 10pm Admittedly we were a little late The member of staff then appeared so desperate to clock off that he made us feel like we were an inconvenience The food was average Lack of facilities in the bedroom meant I couldn t even make a coffee in the morning Overall I feel disappointed by the stay and the service we were given ultimately a waste of money on something that was meant to be special

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Restaurant seemed a bit overpriced but we never tried it out so for all we know it could have been outstanding   Lovely hotel with cool interior and a brilliant breakfast Friendly staff Super quiet and peaceful Also the free boat over to canary wharf was a major plus for us as we were going to the o2 everyday and also allowed us to take a riverboat into central London They also have a costa in the hotel which was a fun addition

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: in a quiet residential area too out the way Very expensive soft drinks in bar service on food very slow Room too warm no air con   Lovely view at the outdoor terrace bar good breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Curtain net could do with reaching across whole window for privacy Prices of drink and food with service charge completely crazy 4 40 for water Otherwise very nice hotel   Well maintained hotel shuttle ferry across river convenient Room lovely bed very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing that we can think of The travel advice maybe could be better or if you could provide a map as the direction of the hotel to Canary wharf quay is not evident from the railway station Also which is best Station Thanks   The Bed was fab and it felt like a real little holiday break The breakfast was excellent and it was lovely to sit on the terrace The staff were really attentive despite beinbg busy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I was told a river view but it wasn t one really it was a side on river view lookjng through buldings misleading also not happy that if lying in bed the tv is fitted to a left hand wall so you can not see the screen properly receptionist were very busy I gave up queuing as took too long   Lovely staff lovely and clean hotel breakfast excellent Beautiful river view from bar dinning rooms and reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel had a beautiful layout with a classy feel the free boat to and from the other side of the Thames was just a thoughtful idea and just adds to your stay The find gesture of the warm chocolate cookies when you check just makes you feel that the staff are going out of there way to welcome you The rooms were so clean and tidy and the views were amazing would 1000 per cent recommend this hotel to everybody

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Beds were comfy View was amazing Fresh cookies on arrival Amazing room Best hotel I ve ever stayed in Free tickets for ferry was amazing Location beautiful and restaurants available

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing  The location is brilliant overlooking the Thames and Canary Wharf Free ferry across the other side of the Thames to reach Tube or DLR stations short walk away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I ve stayed for a night Saturday the 23rd of July I booked through booking com and on the websites states room with view I ve called in advance to have a arranged a small cake and an happy anniversary message in my room And I did state that I would come for a late check in on booking And I confirmed the booking the day before arrival On arrival we are sent to a room with no view and no happy anniversary message in my room The night was already ruined The receptionist offered us a cold or hot beverage to convince us to accept the room and stating that there were no room available with view I refused and he called the manager After 20 min wait the manager showed up and suddenly there was a room available however the room was half the size and the air conditioning was not working And there was a only a side view of the promised view on the websites So the room was super hot and we had to keep opening and closing the room to keep the right temperature The manager promised a bottle of prosecco I waited about an hour for the bottle and I had to go downstairs at the bar and pick it up myself dreadful In addition no one was answering the phone at reception so I couldn t really ask for anything So I ve managed to start my already ruined night at about 2 o clock at night I m addition there were only two hand towel in the room so I had to go downstairs and again cause no one was answering the phone and ask for them The receptionist arrived later with towels still wrapped in the delivery bag and with an annoyed face he gave to me I got surprised he didn t threw them in my face So I will definitely not trust anymore Hilton chain as I ve been let down greatly and ruined my anniversary with my wife   The bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Didn t like the way the way one of the receptionists would make a face and look a customer up and down after checking each one in as they walked away Aircon in room wasn t working the first night and the second night we had a ceiling leak so had to be moved at 1am in the morning   loved the location and facilities food and drinks The way we were looked after after some room issues

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was stuffy and smelt stale not what you expect when your paying the cost you are Also the room I booked was a deluxe queen room which was not deluxe by any means the bed was a standard double bed the bathroom was tiny there was nothing about the hotel that stood apart from a cheaper priced one the price you pay is for the name of the hotel it s most certainly is not reflected in what you get I will not stay there again also the photos advertised with the hotel are very missleading  The bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: River view was a very bad stretch of the neck over a balcony need to be honest guys my view was a tennis court   Location location location free pass on the ferry

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rooms are very congested booking com confirmed the size of the room as 35 square meters however it was not even half the size Bathroom is so small you can t even move The staff were not supporting courteous Location is not great as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Check in and check out took a long time Room cost was charged to our credit card even though I said I wanted to pay in cash Room was very hot as couldn t use air conditioning because it was too noisy I advised at the time of booking that it was my 25th wedding anniversary but we weren t given anything complimentary   Excellent choice at breakfast Service in the restaurant at dinner was very friendly Bedroom and bathroom very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only thing I could think of was the car park entrance could be clearer and having to use the second entrance door   I think if we decided to go to London we would definitely go back to that hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I thought this hotel was great I will definitely recommend it and stay there again The staff were very friendly and helpful The public spaces were well thought out the riverside terrace was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were given biscuits when we arrived which we didn t eat straight away Arrived back in our room on Saturday after being out all day to find that one of our biscuits was missing Might seem petty but it is still stealing Surprised also that bottled water is not supplied in the rooms Had a meal in the bar on the Friday night it was just average  Bed was comfy shower was amazing and breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Low floor room not great soundproofing could hear lots of external noise and in particular was woken by ice machine in corridor throughout night A room with a good view would have been a bonus but a lovely hotel nonetheless   My daughter and her boyfriend were attending the Star Wars convention at the Excel I treated them to a night at the hotel and they raved about it They loved the complimentary ferry to Canary Wharf and cookies on arrival They were also allowed early access to room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was one lady at the reception and her attention was not pleasant But apart from that the other staff was good  Few is the staff was helpful for instance the black chief and the new Italian girl at the breakfast The lady offered us a better room because we wasn t happy with the room they gave us This was very good costumer service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Rather long wait to book in staff being held up by people booking on the door Pre booked could have had a priority queue   Balcony view over river exceptionally quiet no traffic noise despite balcony door open all night Open door meant cool room although middle of that heat wave

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Here go I got my hotel on an offer if I had paid 300 a nite I would been happy I was in room 862 as I was in my room I could hear lots of shouting When looked outside it was a group of teenagers shouting up at another customer on opposite side and lots of sweating from both sides so as you can see 300 a nite to listen to that for over an hour or so not good we had no sleep as lots of noise would I go back no  The staff were very polite and helpful the breakfast was brilliant overall the hotel was OK

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was small there was bird poo and a cigarette butt on the balcony the bathroom was tiny doesn t reflect on the pictures at all no wifi in rooms have to pay 15 a day   The free ferry over to the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Car park was broken so had to walk away to get to the car Food and drink very expensive even at London prices 13 quid for 2 drinks No close tube  Nice hotel in general just had a few issues Breakfast service very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The toilet didn t flush very well   The room was lovely clean and modern Staff were welcoming and helpful Breakfast was really nice too Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bed was broken tiles in bathroom broken asked for a higher floor room was put on ground floor Ferry doesn t run at peak time for dinner which made us miss our reservation   Terrace bar area was lovely for an evening drink

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bed wasn t too comfy Not enough options on room service on the after hours menu  Location is superb with direct access to canary wharf The room was Very clean warm and a nice atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Classic room was tiny bed up against wall which would have been an issue if more than one person was staying  Quick and easy check in Great views over Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I did not like the bed much it was confusing like a water bed but not a water bed Snd there was some mess under the bed and stickyness on the papers  I liked the big room and the cookies cookies were the shizzle

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The rooms and bathrooms were a lot smaller compared with the Marriott which is a short distance away and cheaper staff talk to each other whilst serving you which feels a little rude they Rush through the check in I missed the small print where they actually debit your account of a further 100 on top of the room cost then refund it back within 5 days where they know there has been no damage theft I called about this and was told to call back if the money doesn t go in annoying The worst part of this experience was breakfast having arrived at a busy time I had to queue for about 20mins not too much of a problem but what really annoyed me was that we were queuing when we could see lots of empty vacated tables which just needed cleaning however there was a shortage of staff so the tables were not being cleaned until a lot later than the guests had exited probably to ensure that they had actually finished and not gone to get more food perhaps Also annoying was the girl at the front restaurant desk in front of the queue who would see people walk up let them join the back of the line then bark at them saying excuse me you have to give me your room number first before you line up not what was expected for a Hilton hotel   I like the location for Canary wharf it is really close by the rooms and hotel were clean there s a coffee shop inside the designs of the rooms were very nice and sophisticated and the beds were comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We booked a river view room only to be given a room with no view at all This is false advertising by Double Tree needs to stop We were very dissapointed by this   Very friendly staff clean rooms Excellent breakfast options

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Needed to access tube early on Sunday morning before the ferry was open Had to pay 5 for a taxi to the station very inconvenient as its a fair walk to the stations

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Would have preferred to have had a room looking directly out over the river rather than at the side of the building as being somewhat over the carpark caused a little disturbance sadly  Breakfast was exceptionally good service was excellent and the ferry kind of quirky but we liked it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No fillet steak temporary taken off the menu but Victoria did get the chef to cook two excellent thank you   Our restaurant manageress was very helpful as we did have two small issues which she dealt with no hesitation friendly and helpful her name Victoria on duty Friday Saturday 8 9 July

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: charge for early check in even though they advised we could check in if room ready Given wrong room complained and Manager rude Have written letter to hotel   modern good views nice atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Could have been emailed to advise ferry was not running instead of having to travel to ferry port and then travel back again Had we have had plans it could have delayed us Member of staff could have been more friendly as seemed short but got us checked in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The rooms although look big are tiny Toilet door was hitting the toilet bed was super noisy for the price you pay you should get free wifi and not have to pay for it luckily was out of the room most of the time spent there   Complimentary cookie on arrival ferry service the balcony relaxing feel of the lobby

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I m being extra picky here but the coffee at breakfast wasn t the best to be fair I m a coffee addict and take it seriously and had I had breakfast both days I might have got my coffee from Costa in the hotel the second day   I thought the whole experience was great from the Reception Staff who were so friendly and helpful to the location the use of the water taxi and when that was not working on Saturday morning the hotel arranged free taxi rides to the nearest tube I loved my room which was modern and clean and the bed super comfy I only got to eat breakfast the once but the staff were efficient and friendly There was a wide range of food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fact that the ferry had broken down and there was no one to let us know this and had to make a rushed dash to the tube to make an appointment Costa coffee was very slow and coffee was cold   Loved the river location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Ferry wasn t working on the Saturday and we were not informed by staff even though I d asked for an extra ticket at reception that morning Only informed about replacement taxis after asking what was happening Receptionist extremely difficult to understand English is my mother tongue but I had ask him to repeat himself several times Extremely slow bar service I was the only person at the bar however the bartender continued to clear empty tables for another 5 minutes even though he was aware I was waiting   Great breakfast and lovely outside terrace area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I had a rather frustrating experience I booked the room because it came with a guaranteed view and a bathtub in reality the room looked out onto another building through dirty windows So I complained and the staff tried to be helpful upgrading me to a room with a view of the river I was so pleased until I actually got inside the room It was a family room and had two double beds in it and wasn t cosy or nice at all For a romantic getaway with my boyfriend it just all felt so wrong The bath drain didn t work so we couldn t have a bath And the toilet didn t flush properly It was supposed to be a special night away for us an anniversary and birthday celebration and ended up being rather a let down in terms of the room and facilities etc I had also called ahead twice to stress that it was a special occasion confirm that I would have a view of the river and ask for some wine glasses to be in the room which I was assured I would get and never got When I checked in I asked again and still never got wine glasses Which is just freaking annoying   The staff genuinely tried to help with the issues I had However even in helping they didn t really the room we got shifted into was not nice at all a big open space in the room without chairs or anything even though it did have a view of the river sure It didn t feel warm and cosy and romantic I was really disappointed with the whole experience You expect more from a Hilton It wasn t cheap either

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff not very helpful we had special requests which were ignored breakfast service and bar service slow They always seemed a little short staffed room was small  The bed was amazing slept so well beautiful location lovely views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Great location for 02 the ferry was great and we got ferry from hotel to 02 which was so easy and stress free Great terrace bar for cocktails before Breakfast was lovely huge choice Room was modern with balcony and river view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location isnt very close to any tube stations so not having a car isnt a option   The bed was very comfortable There was a lot of option for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No service charge we would instead leave a tip the pizza at the bar tasted like it was cooked from frozen and not freshly prepared for the price of it   The bed was very comfortable and the room was a good size We had a good view and the complimentary boat service was nice touch The bars were nice but should not include service charge Overall I would come back such a nice treat The homemade cookies were amazing a classy hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was very small and not decorated to the standard of a four star hotel Balcony was filthy and we had staff walking from corridors onto our balcony to get to the other side very early in the morning We were not told about room deposit until we checked in which was inconvenient I feel the room was not value for money   Ferry was a nice touch Staff were pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room did not have double doors opening out to a large balcony as the photo alongside the room showed when I booked The tv was on a bracket that only pulled out far enough to watch from the door not while sat on the bed also there were no plug sockets near a mirror which made drying my hair quite difficult in the morning  The staff were friendly and bed was comfy and the shower was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Well no one had told us when booking that to access the hotel you need to get a ferry This really restricted what we had planned to do as the last ferry back we just before 12   Lively hotel really picturesque One of the best hotel breakfasts I ve had and staff were great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing But Location won t be for everyone especially if wanting to visit touristy bits of London If that s what you want stay closer to centre   The view from our room and the bar terrace was amazing at night The boat across to Canary Wharf so that we could eat and shop Location great for the O2 Nice and quiet especially at weekends

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Great rooms in a spectacular setting of this fine hotel looking across to the wonders of Canary Wharf and all the interesting river transport and tidal variations Great location for short or long stay trips to London particularly recommended is the walk along Thames Path to central London Great Gym at the hotel too good beer at the bar free ferry fantastic breakfast need we go on more

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No hair dryer in the room   Bed comfy Plenty of tea coffee Staff helpful friendly on check in Free ferrie travel Highly recommend Great hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our first room was horrible Really really small and was i think in the middle of the hotel had one small window overlooking the ceiling of the hotel But we went back down to reception and luckily got a much nicer room   The location of this hotel is great we used it as a base for an event at the O2 They offer a free boat service across the Thames where you can get the clipper service to the O2 The room was great although our first room was AWFUL but the lady at reception was nice enough to give us an upgrade We had a balcony over looking the Thames and it was just really lovely Also the bar in this place Just go its beautiful just to sit out on the river watching the world go by at whilst having a nice drink and a bite to eat Also breakfast is really worth getting huge buffet with really yummy food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The corridors seems a bit tiny and scary at first but it is due to the original architecture of the building old docks   Easy to reach metro 5mn bus which are very frequent Amazing and unique view on the thames from the room Brunch on the riverside Clean rooms Very friendly staff Free hot cookie at arrival Very good deal for money Excellent breakfast included in room s price

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The view paid for a city river view but could only really see the ferry dock the roof of the walkway connecting to the other half of the hotel Not exactly the prettiest of views The wifi didn t work properly which wasn t ideal Our room was right invetween the boiler room and the lift so all we could hear throughout the night was the pressure valve in the boiler and the lift shaft clanging The price that we paid for the room 200 just for 1 night I feel wasn t justified with what we received Of all the things we were promised when booking the two most important things the river view and the city view were amongst others the two biggest things lacking I would stay here again if the prices were lowered   The complimentary giant cookies The size of the room it wasn t overly big but had everything you needed The shower was extremely nice may sound silly but the water was really soft Complimentary ferry service to Canary Wharf for people staying at the hotel just show your key I personally feel the hotel would ve been better for prolonged stays I was only there for 1 night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Fabulous stay from arrival to departure first class Staff very helpful and friendly Excellent location free ferry over the Thames to Canary Wharf with excellent shops bars restaurants and metro to all London areas and beyond Room beautiful such a comfy bed Second visit and will be back Breakfast amazing all fresh everything you could want Close to all London has to offer but discreet enough to allow you quiet as well A fab London pub couple of doors down and a posh bar bistro a lovely stroll down the Thames away You will love it xxxx

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: An automatic service charge added to my bill of around 15 just for ordering 2 bottles of cider and a pizza in the bar   The room was quiet and very clean The bed and pillows were extremely comfortable We both had a fantastic nights sleep The breakfast was also very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff were not very helpful We requested room service at 11pm but were told this had stopped After a lot of probing we discovered that the bar was still serving hot food we had to get it ourselves though and wait at the bar whilst it cooked and carry it through the hotel up the lift into our room rubbish service We would have been happy to pay a tray charge and not what I d expect from a Hilton Other hotel room services will do everything to help and make your stay relaxing Bar staff not very attentive one member of staff spilt a whole bottle of coke over the bar which went all over the bar stool and floor but made no attempt to tidy or rectify so it was left dripping and unsightly whilst she stood around chatting   Beds were super comfy breakfast was lovely Check in staff were very friendly great free boat service to the hotel and back to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The incredibly creaky floor boards in the room were really loud probably not great for the people below us but otheriwise nothing Quite a time to travel to the near undergrounds if you have a short stay and a lot to do   Breakfast was really huge and all fresh each morning The rooms were very clean and there was plenty of space for all of our stuff After an issue with the air con the staff were really helpful and moved us straight away to a better room that was bigger still Even though we re quite young it was nice to be treated the same as any older guests would have been

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Everything This was not 1 2 miles from the O2 bathroom was filthy staff was unhelpful Tried to order room service for 30 mins and they kept picking up the phone and putting the phone down

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Firstly when we got in our room and started to unpack we found a pair of ladies underwear not my wife s then my wife found a pubic hair in the bath The next morning at breakfast my wife went to have some cheese which was in a wrapper and noticed it was a month out of date We told a woman that looked like she was managing the breakfast about the cheese in which she did say sorry and walked off with it After that we did not see her again and we was there for at least another half a hour after To top it all off as we checked out we went down to the car park to set off home As we got to the shutters they did not open so we parked back up and went to reception to find out how we get out That s when we got told that we need a car park coin to get out why we was not given this when we checked out I don t know as I paid for the parking whilst checking out so then we finally thought we was ready to go but no we couldn t get out still because the had done the same to two other cars My wife went back upstairs to tell them what was going on She came back down with a caretaker sort of guy who said to my wife I don t know why they always do this Meaning this is an ongoing problem The staff where rubbish at this hotel they defiantly need more training I would not recommend this hotel and I most certainly never stay there again  The bed was good and the room was a good size

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff I was given a double room with no balcony without being told anything I went to reception told them this is not the room I paid for I paid for a queen with balcony and views and was told sorry we are extremely busy tonight we only have that room I said that s unexceptable they told me do you love on London we can redund you money and come and stay with us another night when I was 3 in morning had to organise a babysitter ect also underground car park was full

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The help that was given to me when I had come to the wrong hotel having made an error when booking Reception staff were very obliging and made calls on my behalf to the booking company and also the other hotel All was sorted and we will definitely stay at this hotel again and use the booking company

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No competent and strong assistance with bags All on staff at checkin were very slight women physically Unequipped for bag assistance though willing Then when I was checking out there was no one available at all for bag assistance   Location location location Can t be beat Great shuttle service to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was nothing I didn t like   Very relaxing hotel Great outside bar and food Fabulous courtesy boat Nice size room Hotel parking Easy access to the 02 arena

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: having to leave the room so early in the morning has my coach home wasent until the afternoon   the room was excellent and the bed very comfortable to sleep on

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bar staff in the evening were awful didn t know what they were doing didn t know whether or not they were serving food and took far too long to make drinks and serve you I had also informed the hotel that it was my partners 21st birthday and it would be nice if they could make the room just that extra bit special but no such extras were made which is a shame cause I would have been happy to pay for a bottle of champagne or something in the room on arrival There was a long queue to check in and out we were also woken up by a cleaner in the morning continuously knocking on the door and then when we answered she simply said it was the wrong room Staff at breakfast were not very helpful either although the food was nice and there was a great selection there was no coffee and no one to ask for help   The room was lovely bed super comfy and loads of space in the junior suit Bathroom was very nice and clean Lovely views along the Thames The ferry was also very convenient as dropped you at the hotel Overall the trip was pleasant but would have been greatly improved by better customer service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Amazing location I loved the fact it way quiet and I fell in love with the design and the location of the hotel You get a pass for the water ferry which took us over the river Nice little perk Although the hotel itself was a bit of a labyrinth our room was a decent size and had a very pleasant deco Pretty quiet Only down was that we couldn t access our balcony would ve been nice to sit out w a drink however when mentioned at check out staff very helpfully mentioned to ask on next booking you d like a balcony Breakfast amazing restaurant very nice beautiful sitting outside by the river Loved it Will be defo back w the family

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Service charge being added to bar bill when no service was received Very little hanging wardrobe space No robes provided in room  Staff very welcoming friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It would be useful to have better signage at Canary Wharfe station for directions to the ferry   The bed was extremely comfortable and the room a good size It was lovely having the little balcony and being able to step out to look over the river We left the door open for a while to enjoy the pleasant breeze The complimentary ferry was useful although we preferred taking the bus to Canada Water to pick up the tube into the city The breakfast menu offered was varied and delicious As the weather was good we enjoyed sitting outside on the terrace to eat All the staff we encountered were polite helpful and professional

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Not a big fan of feathered pillows but the bed and room was comfy with good facilities Excellent and friendly room service gave me a freebie too Warm cookie on arrival was a nice touch Lovely breakfast huge variety Was very happy with my stay will definatley come again Also the ferry over the river was just beautiful Wasn t expecting a boat ride Loved it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: To say the hotel had been refurbished the quality of the room was poor Soap dish hung off the wall in shower and various botched patched up repairs  great choice for breakfast staff couldn t be more helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Could not see TV from the bed paid for city river view got a view of residential apartments   The bed was extremely comfy and the choice for breakfast outstanding

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our Queen Deluxe with balcony and river view wasn t ready when we arrived we were early however the receptionist said she had another room available this turned out to be a double bedroom on the ground floor we didn t have time to go back to reception and complain without being late for an appointment when we did try reception was full with people checking in   The wonderful view of the Thames and Canary Wharf from the outside Terrace excellent for a summer event The courteous and capable way in which we were treated when having a problem with our room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When we first arrived I had booked a room witha private balcony and a partial sea view They gave us a tiny room with a tiny window with no view or balcany like I had booked The problem was that I had booked this room especially as an anniversary gift but they gave us a very subpar room Thankfully they changed the room for me after a little complaining and the new room was much better and overall didn t spoil our stay   The location the food the atmosphere and the room was great with a fantastic view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I had purchased a deluxe King room with balcony and was also told that I would be able to check into my room early 12 1pm Upon arriving they said that the room wasn t ready but we were able to leave our bag with them in a safe place When we eventually got into the hotel room at night time we found that our king bed was in fact two single beds pushed together there was no balcony whatsoever and the bathroom wasn t great The power of the shower was also very weak which left us disappointed the morning after Overall I feel that this hotel was not value for money whatsoever and me and my partner both feel very disappointed by this hotel and its facilities   The mattress on the single beds were comfortable and hotel lobby was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was nowhere near a superior room as we d been promised no fridge and tiny bathroom not impressed at all Staff were good but room awful Lunch was abysmal and not edible   Bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff didnt pick up phone at fromt desk several times Ironing board was not good Strong smell of cleaning fluid throughout corridors Doorman didn t offer assistance with luggage Service charge is added to every order even one drink at the bar which seems excessive   I liked the decor very hip and good views of river from most parts of hotel Being given a cookie upon check in was a nice touch Breakfast was good Check in and check out were quick and good service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room not clean bathroom door didn t lock 4 5 flies in the room not comfortable at all Also it was an anniversary treat for the weekend Not happy at all I have stayed at double tree before in Nottingham where excellent rooms and great service Dock lands was a let down   The location by the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast was expensive and not very good quality sausages were cheap and toast cold and soggy The maids walked in on our room prior to our check out wife still in bed   The free ferry Friendly staff Room was nice and clean but not worth the money Shower powerful Big Bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing   Very happy with this hotel Nice location with water taxi stopping at the hotel Very tasteful and modern interior and place kept very clean Staff were also very helpful and friendly Breakfast was delicious too Would highly recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The position of the TV in the room was NOT properly adjusted for guest viewing and could not be changed The bathroom was small and toiletries occupied almost the whole space available on the shelf in front of the mirror leaving almost no space for our personal items It has been a long walk through narrow corridors to the lift The Wi fi connection was usually very poor or completely unavailable in the room especially at night   The king size bed is wide and very comfortable bedside lighting is very convenient The design of the room is nice even for a long term stay All members of the staff are friendly and help you asap

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I am a vegetarian and would have liked a little more choice on the restaurant menu I hope to return again but with my daughter who is vegan so would like more choice to cover that However I enjoyed a delicious well presented meal in the relaxing and ambient restaurant a lovely dining experience   Stylish hotel with very accommodating friendly and welcoming staff Tranquil bedroom with comfortable bed and quality attention to detail Lovely views from bedroom balcony of the Thames on one side and city skyline the other As a single traveller I had a relaxing and enjoyable but too short a stay I will definitely return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The car park located in the hotel was completely full so we had to park our car outside down the road When we arrived they told us our room was no longer available and gave us a different room We took the key and went into the room to find they had given us a key for someone else s room with all they re belongings in there I was mortified I would hope that my possessions Are safe in the room but this made me uneasy The rooms were ok basic nothing amazing for the money   The free token for boat ride across the water

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booked a room with a balcony but you could only see the view of the river and Canary Wharf at the end of the balcony the rest faced another building We had to leave the public terrace at 11pm which was a shame as we were enjoying the view and we were being quiet   Fabulous choice in the breakfast buffet with a great selection Bed was super comfy and staff were friendly and helpful Would definitely stay here again Ferry was useful Nice and quiet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: That I couldn t stay longer   Hotel staff very friendly and helpful Breakfast and evening meals outstanding Views to take your breath away New York has competition Will definately visit again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing at all   I can t praise this hotel highly enough the staff where brilliant food excellent and the room was beautiful I would recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 50 security deposit that s immediately withdrawn on admission and then refunded seems like a long way around it Why not just keep card details to then detuct charges for damages after checkout

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No safe no mini bar no free wifi without hassle  The terrace bar views were superb Lovely location on river Room was spacious Bed very comfy Breakfast spot on

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Balcony in a King superior room Coffee machine would have been good to have   Nice size room amazing bed Good breakfast looking out over the Thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff was very helpful but we had a small confusion upon our arrival The receptionist gave us a room with partial side view on the river whilst we ve booked one with full view on the Thames queen size When we contacted him he said that luckily there was still one room available with full view so we changed for that one Happy end for us eventually but just be sure you get the room you booked   Helpful staff nice view nice breakfast ferry boat service for free to from Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I didn t like the fact that i was charged twice for my stay I was also charged more money which i wasn t aware of   I liked the hotel and how it was presented And i appreciated the staff for recognizing their mistake and giving me and my partner free breakfast and a pass to the executive lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It needs a mini bar and the bathroom is too small   The staff were very friendly and helpful I would definitely recommend this hotel to a friend The room was very comfortable with a nice view from the balcony

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room size was small for a king deluxe room Travelodge has bigger rooms The tv was awkwardly mounted on the wall making it hard to view   Very nice decor in the reception and amazing breakfast The staff were helpful and warming and the free ferry service to canary wharf was helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed It was sooo uncomfortable I did not like the check in The staff member asked for my credit card which i thought was for ID purposes he then debited my card with 100 with no explaination It was for any incidentals during the stay but if I hadnt of asked I would not have ben told On check out I was also billed for someone else s room This caused a delay whilst they sorted things out   Parking facilities was good Free water ferry to canary Wharf Clean Hotel Good room size with lovely views The hotel was in a good location for the Olympic Stadium

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Unnaccounted for debits from my bank account and the cost of the room was higher than the price arranged on booking com  All you can eat breakfast with readily available fresh orange juice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Would of been nice to be aware of getting to hotel via bus link as arrived back after last ferry crossing so had to find this out ourselves bathroom could of done with being a little bigger  Very nice hotel enjoyed travelling across river to hotel which was an experience staff very friendly good choice at breakfast rooms clean bed comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We felt that the on line booking and all the information regarding the room size and style were misleading and hence when first impression of walking in to the room was one of disappointment Buffet breakfast hot food was cold It was not until we were leaving did we happen to see the second car park I would have been happier parking in secured parking than on the street over night  The Hotel facilities and location were good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No response for 40 minutes when calling room service upon placing an order for sandwiches we received packet sandwiches Not what you d expect for a Hilton   Overall a really lovely hotel with friendly staff you even get a cookie on arrival Lovely room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: different levels of floor in the room going from the en suite to the bedroom nearly broke my foot a couple of times bad design wasn t off to a good start  breakfast was brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The wifi wasn t free I don t know if this was because of the kind of room we booked or just policy It wasn t a massive hindrance as 4G was available throughout the hotel but it would have been nice not to use our own data   The bed was amazing It was an executive queen room and needless to say the bed was fit for royalty Great space and light amazing views and just all round satisfaction

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No swimming pool fitness room could be better  Beautiful location river view from blacony complementary ferrey to canary wharf Nice welcome warm cookie on arrival Nice rooms very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was extremely uncomfortable in room 205 it has a very unforgiving lump on the left hand side of the bed Our friends who were staying in a family room said their bed was very comfortable Also the ability to get extra pillows would have been nice   Bar man knew and remembered our drink choices over the weekend and remembered our room number even though we only went to the bar couple of times This was a lovely special touch Also as the trip was for a special occasion we ordered a bottle of bubbles for the first day which was swiftly delivered on check in with a lovely bowl of complimentary fruit Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: View from the room was more onto an ugly building across but from the right angle you still have a view of the river It s a short walk from the ferry to Canary Wharf station but long enough so that if it were raining it would be off putting But in good weather it s a pleasant walk But there is a bus supposed to arrive in front of the hotel too that goes to Canada Water station To be honest this is nitpicking   The room was beautiful and well looked after The bar is cosy and quiet the view was over the river and quite stunning at night The free ferry across made it easy to reach the hotel you walk off the boat onto up the quay and then into the hotel lobby which is great The price I got 230 for 2 nights in a SuperKing bed was cheaper than Stratford Double at a Premier Inn on that weekend date A no brainer really

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Evening meal and lack of available snacks in bar I e crisps nuts etc our table was in line with area where food was cooked for evening meal we were not happy to see chef nibbling at food while preparing it also not wearing hygiene gloves while handling food Evening meal was of poor quality chips soft and over cooked chicken only tasted of salt We sat in bar to relax about 2 hours before our table was booked for we needed some snacks to keep us going but we re told none were available but we could order off menu which was no good when we had booked table We ended up going in 50mins earlier for our meal Not happy We have stayed at hilton docklands on many occasions prior to double tree but are not impressed with double tree I very much doubt if we will return   Nice welcome at reception Very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When I asked for a river view room I was expecting to look at the river face on Instead I had to look at the patio area then to the left for a bit of river   The breakfast was amazing So much on offer and it was all delicious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing stands out which I didn t like but if I really had to pick something it was how busy the staff were at breakfast We asked for coffee but as they were so busy they forgot   Brilliant location friendly staff and very clean The staff couldn t be more helpful at reception when I needed directions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Location although free ferry service is available to address this issue but timing on weekends are not practical As per advert every room has river view and I requested room with river view as per advert but my request was declined as river view rooms were available at premium rates   Good welcoming staff and breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff need to pick up phone calls and there was no fridge I previously booked a queen room it was better than the King room because the King room didn t have all the complimentary essentials for some reason Bedding was creased and looked rushed Tv wiring was seen instead of hidden   Quality and vibe was fantastic Area is prestigious Cookie from the reception was nice Free tickets to ferry was great didn t use it though

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No view over river  The cookies and most comfortable bed Our check in attendant Can t remember his name but Italian from Milan Most helpful young man

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel was so far away from the tube station which meant travelling late at night was almost impossible as there was no way of getting back from the tube station   The room was spacious and clean staff were helpful and the views were amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff was rude and stuck up Got my booking all wrong at check in No fridge in the room and the car park gate was a hassle  The ferry crossing was free and very convenient and the view from the bar outside was beautiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The underground was a 25minute walk from the underground we did not know about the ferry until we arrived The room was not particularly large and no view to look out onto   The room was clean and the staff friendly also there was a good choice at breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Tiny claustrophobic rooms Expensive wifi Poor service Noone picks up the phone Had to chase roomservice 4 times went through reception who promised they would call back but nothing happened In the end it took 1 5hour to get some food to the room which meant i could not get to bed until 1am Asked for a newspaper at breakfast was promised to have 1 brought to my table finished breakfast 45 minutes later without any papers Seems like staff very nice and agreeable but then doesn t care much about carrying out the actual service Far from public transport  Beautiful location by the docks Clean Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No negatives really perhaps a mirror behind the dressing table would be good for whilst doing your hair and had to make sure back for last boat at 11 50pm apart from that cant wait for my next visit   Great location being just across the river from central london the boat bus was great stayed there for the o2 just a short boat trip over river minutes walk to tube station and one stop to the 02 always a boat available when needed and just made it more exciting also so close to tube station anyway or clipper boat taking you to all of the sites great fun hotel was great very individual with the internal walls and decoration very clean rooms big for london too and we only had basic twin good facilities in room great large shower warm chocolate cookie in reception was a lovely touch too and yummy cocktail bar lovely and breakfast best ive had so much choice couldnt really fault it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Double bed in standard room is too small Very noisy antisocial behaviour outside our part of the hotel on Saturday night until dawn   Parking on site Bar for a nightcap Room decor and air conditioning Ferry service to Canary Wharf Complimentary cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Are you kidding me You greeted me with a goddamn cookie I d marry this hotel if it wasn t frowned upon   The bed was ridiculously comfy honesty it was like sleeping in the fat fold of the Pillsbury doughboy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was nothing I didn t like   The staff were ALL excellent From the lady who checked me in and got me a room immediately and I was early to the Bar Staff and the lady who delivered my evening meal They all were professional kind and engaging It made a huge difference

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the room that i rent was relatively smaller than i expected  the location next to the famous river and the bar are both lovely The staffs are generous and charming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It would be nice to know the ferry times as we weren t sure how often it ran and until what time   Amazing hotel wish I could stay longer Complimentary ferry service makes it easy to cross Thames and reach Canary Wharf tube station or take a ferry to the center of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Paid for a room with balcony but was given one without and they would not of done nothing if I didn t go back to reception and tell them I paid for balcony and the view wasn t good as I couldn t even see Canary Wharf Ordered room service and they bought the wrong food up

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: room was no 106 and was a little noisy as on the back is a pub but it was a bank holiday weekend so very busy   Greatr service from reception upon arrival Hotel was in a lovely location bar was nice and breakfast was delicious especially the pancakes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No breakfast include in price Our rooms Windows overlooked a court yard garden this was ok but the Windows didn t open we rang reception and they were very happy to change our room no question asked excellent service  Very friendly staff very helpful excellent food Large rooms and large bed very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room smaller than expected for superior room but still adequate   Hot cookies on arrival Location fantastic Views from balcony stunning as per pictures attached with Thames and Canary Wharf to right and to left shard gherkin cheese grater and sky garden walki talki Service brilliant Restaurant beautifully cooked food Terrace fab Parking 12 overnight is very good for London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Perhaps table service in the bar would be nice make a guests experience a bit more relaxing   The cookie on arrival The shower is much better than ours at home Transport over the river was very convenient All the info on arrival We were able to leave our bags at the hotel whilst at Comic Con Getting nibbles with drinks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bed could ve been slightly comfier creaked every time we moved Lack of toiletries toothpaste   Great location opposite Canary Wharf easily accessed by bus or free ferry shuttle Large room with fantastic view of the Thames Breakfast served until late with a fantastic selection we got there ten minutes before end of service and nothing had been cleared away which makes a nice change from other hotels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Service charge for even buying 1 drink is strange but i believe that is normal for this part of the world   Very spacious rooms Lovely location and views from hotel Very good idea with the boat into canary wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Mini bar would have been good It was difficult to get drinks in our room Also very cold room so bathrobes would be good  Loved the welcome cookie and friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: beautiful room amazing views fantastic bed wonderful restaurant the staff here are incredible a credit to their employer anyone looking to see customer service at it s best needs to visit this hotel I had a flawless stay and would return again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast was a disaster Very long queue to get in the dining room Tables not cleared and generally very disorganized A shame really   We loved this hotel Fabulous location and lovely welcoming staff Our room although small was very comfortable with a stunning balcony view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Tiny tiny elevators They also don t tell you that unless you get dropped off at the front door by a cab you have a healthy climb up two floors with all your bags to get there after getting dropped off on the street from the bus   Awesome pillows Good public transit options to all of London Very quiet Got the best sleep of our two week vacation at this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The noise booked a suite above a terrace party I wasn t informed of then had to move rooms a further 2 times   Food was nice however the chef was wiping her nose on her whites which was off putting

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was lovely but the bed was so hard both myself and my husband had no sleep and chronic backache the next day   The hotel was lovely the staff were professional our room was gorgeous and we enjoyed the food in the restaurant and sitting out on the terrace in the sun by the Thames The downside was the very very hard bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was small Check in was a little slow and disjointed Local knowledge was lacking from staff on reception   Nice bar with a good ambience Free ferry Breakfast was nice and staff at breakfast very friendly and efficient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was nothing which could have made our stay any more enjoyable it was perfect in every way Special thanks to the team who prepared our room and the gentleman on reception who ordered the taxi to take us back to Kings Cross station  My husband and I stayed at the hotel as we were visiting a show at the O2 arena to celebrate our 55th wedding anniversary My daughter unbeknown to us phoned the hotel and asked for our room to be special the results were amazing I have taken pictures with my ipad but am not sure how to upload them here Shortly after our arrival 2 members of staff came to see if we were happy with our room reception staff phoned shortly after to see if the room as okay We had a wonderful stay and I cannot recommend the hotel staff enough for making our stay so special The food and service in the reception were excellent everyone was friendly and helpful I would definitely stay here again and would recommend this hotel and its staff to anyone

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had many issues with the hotel as soon as we arrived Firstly they had given us the wrong room and then we rang the reception so many times without any answer We rang all the numbers and no one answered any of our calls which made us have to walk all the way down to the lobby Overall it was a very disappointing stay with us questioning whether this was really a hilton as we have never experienced such bad service in any hilton we have stayed at before We would not recommend this hotel to anyone

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hair in the bathtub The doors to the room were in bad shape they d obviously had plaques on them that had been removed and just left as is Just a question of aesthetics but still The view from the balcony was nice enough the city skyline beyond the roof tops but the balcony itself was in disrepair Bar was OK however the under section of the bar is filthy I put my hand under it to steady myself while I sat in the bar stool and came away with a nasty surprise on my hand Linens on the bed a bit rough The Black Pudding at breakfast is a firm fav but it was raw and quite obviously so so that wasn t a plus point   Nice location on the river excellent ferry service over to Canary Wharf Nice large room we received an upgrade on arrival I had requested a river view which they couldn t offer Room was fine Nice big comfy bed Breakfast was VAST and plenty of choice and good bacon The chef made me a fresh omelette Excellent and attentive waiting staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Checkin was extremely poor with no details given about stay breakfast wifi how to find room Toilet didn t flush properly Drawer didn t close Reception didn t answer phone Couldn t get shower to work  Room was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Paid for an upgrade at 50 and was not upgraded room was changed on the second day and when we went into this room we found someone had left a solid present in the toilet Not great Was not happy with how it was handled and is still going on 2 3 weeks later

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Well the rooms are as basic as a Travelodge or Premier Inn despite paying for a deluxe room The tv didn t work the bedside lights didn t work not even bottles of water were provided I wouldn t bother paying the hiked fees for this hotel spend your money on a decent hotel that is actually worth the amount There s alot more noise than I was expecting too The beds are so soft so I wouldn t recommend if you suffer from back problems Overall I m very disappointed   The only things that made this hotel stand out from a regular budget hotel was the free ferry over to Canary Wharf and the pretty lobby when you enter the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very busy for breakfasthe but it was the Sunday of the London marathon Unable to get a hot drink at the bar the previous evening when we got back from o2 arena  Very handy for the ferry along the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Long queue for breakfast and poor service once seated Eventually seated in bar area for breakfast Spent the whole of this time with a crowd of other guests right next to us all waiting to be allocated a table Had to request tea and coffee for which milk and sugar arrived 15 mins later This situation made worse as tea making facilities in bedroom had not been restocked or clean cups provided after use on Friday Disappointing end to an otherwise pleasant stay   Free ferry shuttle Friendly staff Outdoor patio and decking area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was a bit squeaky   The hotel was in a very nice location great view at night from the bar but the food and drinks could be little more cheaper Overall a lovely hotel for a couple of nights stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Too expensive for what it offered Public spaces and decor a bit tired  Very friendly obliging staff All very helpful Good comfortable bed bathroom well stocked

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Fab location super views great staff excellent breakfast bar terrace faultless Reliable ferry shuttle great access to city Thames Path well worth finding all the hidden treasures

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I thought as it was my partners birthday i had booked a room with a balcony and river view i could slightly see the river but i more had buildings and a badminton court It was my partners birthday and i had spoken to someone and they said they would put a little something in the room i got their and their wasn t anything when i rang reception the lady on the phone said to me ill pass u to the manager she can deal with you in a very very rude manor then the phone was hung up on me i didn t feel like the 3 ladies at the front of reception was approachable to talk to them about it especially after i had been spoken to the way i had on the phone I have always stayed at your branches and found them lovely but to be honest this kind of ruined our trip a bit as i was very angry   The boat service was amazing and the staff was soooo friendly and helpful also the breakfast was very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast service was poor but I note two staff were off sick customer services compensated me for this Real down side was the ferry doesn t run past midnight   Staff were great in the hotel nice rooms comfy bed great customer service nice views from the room good access to central London and the Docklands

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Sometimes the employees don t look really organised e g at breakfast   Amazing cross outside fluffy inside fries Beautiful room Very good breakfast with the best real bread in Great Britain so far

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast looked delicious and had loads of choice but cooked breakfast was all cold and served on cold plates Easily avoidable mistake which ruined it Tried to charge me over 11 to make two quick phone calls to my husband who was lost having been redirected to a different car park as hotel one full and had my phone with him by mistake That was very disappointing and ridiculously priced They took it off the bill but to try and charge that amount seemed very unfair   Lovely hotel and great to get free ferry Friendly staff and lovely big room with great view Check in was quick and professional I would return Good value for money Really lovely outside terrace and great playground very close

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had to keep re logging on to free wi fi   Liked the setting very much Built over old docks and with views across the river with dedicated ferry from Canary Wharf Easier access via Canada Water and C10 bus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: One of the reception staff was abrupt and unhelpful I do not understand why we was offered a newspaper if it wasn t going to be available We didn t find out our paper was unavailable until we asked for it We had to queue for a long time for Breakfast there clearly was not enough staff available to cope with the demand I had to ask for a glass for juice on several occasions It was a similar scenario when i wanted a bowl i was finally told they were all being washed   When we arrived we were made to feel welcome and offered a warm cookie I liked that when we advised a member of Staff the hot water and phone in our room was not working we were offered an alternative room There was a member of staff working outside by herself she was totally run off her feet However she couldn t do enough to help us

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The single beds in my twin room were not great standard single size but just not very comfortable   Good sized twin room nice and clean with good facilities big TV nice shower etc Hotel facilities were great parking water taxi bar etc Had a burger from the bar menu for dinner which was nice and breakfast was great lots of choice and all good quality

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our sleep was disturbed due to a continuous hum all through the night had we been there for another night we would had gone to reception  The location staff were very friendly and helpful the boat from hotel to Canary wharf was really useful excellent value for money will definitely book again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The front desk staff was clueless when we asked about booking tours   The luggage porter named Melvan was great and very helpful i finding a doctor for me due to my illness while there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Having to pay for wi fi access which I elected not to do The free hour was actually only thirty five minutes I know because I timed it lol   The restaurant staff who were very friendly and welcoming Nothing was too much trouble

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Poor sound proofing Extremely noisy on corridor and outside Lack of privacy when curtains not drawn due to carpark being immediately outside   Liked location Wifi fine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Small window in room which could only be opened a small way because of security lock Step down into bathroom from room   Warm cookie on check in Free ferry to Canary Wharf Good selection of food at breakfast Friendly polite staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I only booked the hotel because it had a river view and even called and asked if it had a river view Turned up and had a view of the loading bay so all I could see out of a tiny 3x3 foot Window was a brick wall and woken up by people outside pulling trolleys around loading trucks Not romantic at all   The view from th terrace was absolutely beautiful The most amazing way to have a drink and some food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Poor standard of pillow in the room Disturbed at night to pay for room service  Amazing location Quality bar foyer Complimentary ferry on the river is excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel could do with a small store selection of supplies nearby or on the premises A fridge in the rooms would be very beneficial My only other minor quibble would be how small the bathroom sinks are I enjoy having a really large sink when I go away as I only have a very small sink at home so was disappojnted to see that the sink was the same size as or possibly even smaller than my one at home doh   Having been to this hotel several times over the years I was really glad to say that this visit didn t disappoint either The staff were excellent the location splendid the ferry staff were excellent the rooms were immaculate The rooms were immaculate the quality of the breakfast was superb and the restaurant manager was an excellent compere Mrs McLucas she was warm and friendly but was still clearly running a very tight and efficient ship and definitely serves some credit Excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Loved everything X  Loved the room with the river view Very clean hotel and very friendly staff Wish I could of afforded to stay a few nights not just one If you ever have any offers or deals on please let me know I would definitely come back Great hotel Also loved the free ferry over to Canary Wharf very convenient Thank you x

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel was quite far from a tube station   The room was very clean and tidy as was the rest of the hotel The food in the restaurant was very good There was an added bonus of the free ferry use to get to the other side of the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was no net curtain to cover the balcony door and you could see the bed in the next room the only way to get privacy was to shut the curtains which blocked all the sun out The TV was fixed flat to the wall therefore you could not lay on the bed to watch TV to relax We ordered a continental breakfast to be brought to our room Firstly it arrived later than within the 10mins of your given time there was no spoons for the cereals there was no pastries or croissants and quite frankly the tray arrived looking like it had been thrown together and not nicely laid out as we would have expected I rang Room Service to ask for the rest of our breakfast items but got no reply so I rang Reception A short time later pastries and spoons were brought to the room but no croissants We were not happy with the way the staff member pushed his way into the room we felt our privacy wasn t respected on this occasion We would not return to this Hotel Lastly there was no light near the only mirror in the room that would be used to dry your hair and put on make up light is needed for these tasks   The Bed was really comfy All the hotel staff spoke and said Hello as they walked passed you The views are lovely too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
