Full_Review: Nothing  Very warm welcome by staff and warm cookies which was a lovely start Hotel is simply stunning breakfast was fab and the views across the Thames were superb Room was lovely well equipped with hairdryer and iron and the view was great There s a bus stop right outside the hotel which you can travel to the tube which was ideal and the ferry passes were very handy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast was not worth the extra money although nice the bacon was rock hard and by the time you sat down the food was near enough cold The staff wasn t very helpful and did not make us aware before hand or during booking in that an extra 50 a night will be charged and given back within 4 5 working days I am stating this for the people like me who did not know this   Nice hotel in a remote location near the river themes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The view we had  Room was lovely although the view wasn t that great but didn t affect our stay the ferry crossing was a lovely way to get to the hotel and all the staff I came across were very friendly and helpful hotel clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Maze like corridors making it difficult to navigate Size of bathroom   Location Extra special service from the waiter and chef when we ate on the terrace Quality of room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Weird smell in hall way Not enough mirrors in the room  Bed was very comfy staff very polite and helpful Great location very useful free ticket for river bus Room very spacious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Disappointing that wifi wasn t free   Great location for the O2 short ride on the Thames Clipper Very helpful staff Great rooms really comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Check in was a bit slow but nothing to complain about   Location and how easy using the ferry was cookies were nice on arrival Breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast was chaotic and disorganised Waited over 20 mins to get seated and then disappointed by poor service no crockery food quality and cleanliness of dining room   Lovely hotel in ideal location Room comfortable 1 min Ferry to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff need to learn manners Don t boast about things like choc chip cookies when you don t provide them Told the bar would shut at 1 00a m when it shut at 11 45p m   The bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bar staff slow messed up a few orders including ours No personalities no enthusiasm Pillows hard and no mini bar   Cookies given at check in and parking on site

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Wasnt happy that i didnt get a walk out balcony like others and that the water was not warm only luke warm  The hotel was very comfortable The view was amazing especially at night the rooms were a nice size

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only thing that bothered me slightly was having the room situated next to the door which allows access to the room near us This meant banging and people talking loudly late at night   The location and rooms were lovely Very clean the staff couldn t do more for you which was great The breakfast was included in our stay which was really nice had full English buffet plus cold meats and croissants etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bathroom very small no minibar   Lovely bed and pillows very friendly staff and stylish decor Loved the outdoor terrace overlooking the Thames also great pub 2 minutes walk away for a change Free ferry across to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: that my husband tripped several times over a tiny step in the bathroom and has a bruised toe and looks like hes going to lose his toenail not good really design fault  nice sized room good view free water travel to the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I dislike having to pay for wifi especially as you can get it free on the bus   The ferry across the river and down to Greenwich for the start of the marathon was an added bonus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: That we had to exchange our rooms 3 times due to it not being up to our expectations for what we paid for Had to also go all the way back to the other room to get our own luggage Felt like we got fobbed of by most of the staff when we needed assistance always got told to ask another member of staff Also the room wasn t clean at all dirty towels and bed sheets Broken plug socket and also not a good TV for a 4 hotel  We liked the suite that we had and also the Canary Wharf view It was nice having a living room as well as a bedroom Free warm cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our room was right next to the lift machinery equipment and very noisy and also right above the loading area which was a problem and spoilt our break Value For 99 No We complained at reception and they offered a free breakfast but that wasn t any compensation Then as we checked out we were blocked in on the hotel car park for half an hour by a guest that had gone out for the day Its a free for all with parking that the hotel have no control over Our stay overall was very disappointing and it ruined a special weekend We had looked forward to for a few months Nice staff but we got a raw deal and won t be returning  The convenience of the hotel ferry to get us across the river into the city good access plus parking at the hotel is a benefit The staff are very helpful and polite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: My request of feather free room not take care of had to sleep without any bedcover Even after I mentioned it on my booking called the hotel nd checked and checked while booking in Disappointed that even after mentioning it 3 times it was not taken care Got free parking for the inconvinience but did not get any sleep very poor communication Not happy at all   The service at the bar in the afternoon Excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Grab and Go was advertised as being 24 hours but was closed when we arrived  Incredibly comfortable bed and lovely views of the docklands Really liked how there s the little bridge over the old docking station to get to one part of the hotel from another

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Literature stated free wifi It was only free for 1 hour   location great for access to any part of London but no need to go far anyway free river shuttle to Canary Wharf short river trip to Greenwich Breakfast couldn t be better river views excellent Our rooms as good as expected The bestest hot chocolate chip cookies free on arrival Bath AND shower in ensuite Absolutely lovely decor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Due to the nature of the event in London the price was premium Bathroom was small for an executive room  Stayed in this hotel as it was ideally situated for me to run the London marathon The hotel went out of its way to cater for the marathon runners early breakfast healthy choices ferry to Greenwich ideal for marathon runners Room was spacious and bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Some staff weren t briefed about the additional marathon services so was confusing with conflicting information  Fantastic breakfast hotel put on free ferry for marathon runners to get us to the start line Free cookies on check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff were so good Eddie sorted disabled parking straight away for my Mum Sandra sent fruit to my room as soon as we checked in Our 6th stay at hilton riverside Now Hilton doubletree

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The lift to our room was very small and no mini bar in the room   The room was just the job bed was very comfortable the bar was lovely and the staff very pleasant and efficient The location for the concert we attended at the O2 was really good FREE FERRY Breakfast was superb with very polite staff and plenty of choice thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The tele doesn t move off the wall can not watch this In Bed properly   The beds were comfy great facilities for runners for the marathon good breakfast and great boat taxi service to the start

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast staff very rude I had to ask 3 times for a cup of tea at breakfast most hotels offer you a pot when it did come it was slammed down in front of me Also whenever I ve stayed at a Double Tree Hilton we ve been given warm cookies on arrival this wasn t offered but must have been available as I saw other guests with them   Clean comfortable rooms nicely decorated

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our room felt like it was in the staff area poor view car park bins corridors a bit shabby in places lifts tiny Our room was adequate but small bathroom location my only gripes Nice to have a balcony if only to strain ones neck to see the view of Canary Wharf The bar staff were frankly poor this needs addressing especially in the evening after O2 events More heated areas outside too for us non smoking capers Cookies not all that   We loved the novelty of the ferry Decor of public areas was modern comfortable Location for the O2 was fabulous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The complimentary ferry there was a massive queue of people queuing up to catch the ferry after the gig we were attending at the 02 and we could see the boat was just sitting there the other side of the water unmanned it should have been there waiting when the gig finished Lots of people stay at this hotel because they re attending a gig at the 02 so the hotel really needs to get this weighed up   Lovely room comfortable bed gorgeous breakfast with amazing choice Great location with wonderful views of the river skyline from the hotel bar Would probably ask for a room with a view next time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I waited 1hour for room service I phoned to remind and turns out they forgot about me Came up with wrong order Dirty towels No vending machine for Snacks but yet they have a vending machine for batteries and paracetamol   It was a night away from home so that was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Would of been great if you could of used the ferry without your room keyou rather than having to pay surely if you ve stayed an you weren t aware of the service before you should be able to use a return service   The bed was so comfy massive thumbs up I didn t want to leave Loved the welcome cookie too however just the gesture I m sure there were nuts in the cookie an I didn t want to risk a reaction The location was lovely as it s further out would of been nice for recommendations

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The price of the breakfast I went to the harvester at the O2 and had an eat as much as you like full english and continental with unlimited drinks for less than half the price of two full English breakfasts at the hotel   I was impressed by the facilities and the cosy personal feel to the place

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I requested a room overlooking the river we got a room with a white washed very small window I had said it was my husbands 50th birthday surprise weekend when I booked yet I had to go and complain about it not the best start to our weekend we were moved to a a room with a view after I complained but having to do so we only just made out theatre time all became very rushed and harrised   Most comfy bed ever

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Fantastic staff who were helpful polite and went out of there way to be friendly to the adult with learning disabilities I was accompanying fantastic Buffet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Slightly off the beaten path but it is nice returning to a quiet that isn t in the middle of the busy city   Great staff very friendly Staff were always more than happy to help Nice and quiet place too Nice clean place Food in the restaurant was fantastic however I d say breakfast was slightly expensive Dinner though Outstanding

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Location A long walk 1 hour 40 mins if you miss the ferry which stops at midnight As a mature couple we had to ensure we were making our way back to hotel well before 11 30pm So much for the city that never sleeps we had no choice  Staff were wonderful breakfast was outstanding and the chef would make things to order A nice touch with the cookie

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fact it took nearly 30 minutes to check in was crazy To have an e check in desk which I had done and a Hilton Honours desk to recognise different guests was great but then to not let guests use the different desks was madness I tried to check in at 2pm but was told the room was not available you should have let me check in at that point instead of telling all guests to come back later creating a massive queue that you could not cope with As I say MADNESS Additionally it took 3 keycards to get out Car Park 2 and I did not enjoy walking up and down the road   Overall the feeling of the hotel was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The ferry time table didn t make any sense for weekend not easy to travel around without the ferry at night We had to get a taxi  Very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room 431 was unsuitable as the sloping roof had windows that the curtains would not close to conceal and we moved rooms so that the light did not wake us in the early hours   River location and shuttle ferry Comfortable beds and spacious room Breakfast was good Nice bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room felt a bit clinical and box like Tube was a good distance from hotel despite river link Which didn t start till 8 55 on a weekend Room was quite noisy as backed into homes Didn t quite have the same feel as the Marriott we stopped in on Canary Wharf in December which cost a similar amount   Breakfast was lovely and staff pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It was my boyfriends birthday and the staff were so lovely he received a cheesecake delivered to the room and a complimentary breakfast it was so lovely Will definitely be going back again and again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Everything was great apart from there was only a few channels on the TV only BBC 1 and E4  The receptionist gave us welcoming chocolate cookies They also gave us free passes for the Ferry to get into Canary Wharf for the duration of our stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing wrong with the hotel just Booking com s description of the room was very misleading Riverview should have read No View windows covered in etch vinyl so not transparent Tut Tut Booking com

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Walk in shower requested NOT provided Double room booked they tried to give us a twin No Heating in the room had to have a space heater They made me sign a form due to my slight disability i am not in wheelchair nor walking sticks in case of fire they would come and knock on my room VERY VERY humiliating for me

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: NOT REALLY VALUE FOR MONEY FOR THE SIZE OF THE ROOM ALSO STILL HAVENT HAD AN INVOICE EVEN AFTER CONTACTING THE HOTEL AGAIN   FREINDLINESS OF STAFF

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The view from the bar looking over Canary Wharf and the free unlimited travel river crossing from the hotel for easy access to the other side of the river and the nearest tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Terrible location We specifically booked this hotel because booking com said this hotel was 0 8 miles from Tobacco docks where we were attending the BAFTA gaming awards that evening We could have stayed at any hotel but chose this one based purely on location value for money What a joke 0 8 miles should take no more than 5 minutes in a taxi And it probably was 5 minutes from our destination ACROSS THE RIVER The reality of it was a 20 minute journey via car Booking com need to make this clear on their website as we were then late We also paid extra from a room upgrade A superior Twin room Well all I can say is God knows what the standard twin room was like because there was nothing superior about the superior twin It was tiny The bathroom was so small I didn t even have room to dry myself off after the shower It reminded me of being on a boat The layout of the hotel is also horrendous Upon check in you are given an elevator number a floor number and a room number All of the elevators are located in different locations across the hotel It was like a maze We had to ask for help in the end as lift 5 was no where to be seen Eventually after walking through the main building across a bridge and around several corners we finally found it And that was just to get the lift up to our floor Oh and suprise suprise despite us having 2 suitcases 2 suit carriers and a carry on bag not one person offered to help take our stuff to the room   Check in was ok Guests are given a hot cookie upon check in which was a nice touch Decor throughout the hotel reception is nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: we were a little gutted about the view none from our room 404 We had been upgraded for a room with a bigger bed for myself and my daughter to share but I think we would have preferred a smaller bed as only 1 night with a better view over the river   Booked the room for just 1 night while I took my young daughter to a concert at the O2 Great location for this a the river boat took us straight there and back no getting around London late at night with a child myself and my 8 yr old shared a room and staff upgraded us on arrival for a bigger bed which was huge and very comfortable Huge shout out for Cristian who made a big friend with my daughter and delivered pastries upto our room for her breakfast which made her feel very special Extremely clean room and overall lovely hotel The compliment boat was fabulous and another shout out for those guys who again made my daughter feel very special

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: having stayed at hilton docklands on a number of timesI noticed the staff have changed some of the new staff were not as friendly as the old staff but overall we enjoyed our stay   breakfast n a bed very comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast could have been included in the costing considering the price   The luxurious feel of the hotel was lovely and I especially liked the free water bus to the Canary Wharf during the stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Not being able to afford to stay more often   The staff were excellent and treated us very well My wife and I were really impressed with their attention to us and to any questions we had We were treated very courteously by reception the breakfast chef and the ferry assistant but the smiles seemed to emanate from all staff We also liked our view of the Thames even if it was sideways on

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Didn t like to be asked for a 50 holding fee incase we had anything to eat drink or used facilities Which we only used the bar and paid then and there This was not stated when I booked it and was waived in the end but should be made clear when booking Also check in was 3 but room was still not ready at 3 so we had to wait around   Lovely view across the Thames beds were comfortable and overall very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The ferry was actually great after i booked the hotel i realised it was not in canary wharf itself but across the river so i was expecting to spend a lot of money on taxis but still slightly inconvenient if planning to go out at night One of the men on reception was a little rude and not helpful at all which is a shame as all the other staff were brilliant and very accomodating My friend and i do not know London that well and he talked to us like we were idiots   Really lovely hotel we got complimentary breakfast because i had a gold card which had so many choices Very clean hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I spent the weekend here with my partner the hotel was clean and staff were extremely friendly Hotel facilities were great and the location of the hotel was ideal as there were a variety of transport options to get you to and from the centre of London We particularly liked the complimentary ferry link between the hotel and canary wharf We had an excellent trip to London and will definitely use this hotel again and recommend it to family and friends too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only problem I had was the location as it was further away from the centre of London than I anticipated However the ferry service operated very frequently which helped alot   The bed was very comfortable and the buffet breakfast was very pleasing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing   Although there had been a slight hiccup with our booking we were upgraded for free to an executive room allowing us to use the executive facilities which were brilliant the stay was perfect It was my boyfriends 21st and the whole experience was brilliant The boat shuttle service is a brilliant way of getting across to Canary Wharf where there is excellent restaurants bars

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location for sightseeing was great however if would have wanted to stay and eat late after the show we went to to see public transport doesn t run too late  Bed was very comfy lots to chose from at breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was extremely comfortable and the room service was excellent and really quick The staff were more than happy to deal with any request we had Breakfast was 10 10 Large choice of food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Service charge added to food bill in restaurant without prior notification Food prices already high enough so I felt that this was a quite cheeky   Warm welcome by staff inc a warm cookie Clean spacious room with free WIFI Windows and balcony door that fully opened to allow fresh air in Free ferry across to Canary Wharf direct from hotel pontoon was superb

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Great big noisy chimney type thing outside our room you could here it over the tv so I had no sleep Was supposed to check in at 3pm but room wasn t ready so got in at 4 30pm I m disabled and needed to lay down and take meds Whole room and bathroom stank of sewage phone didn t work breakfast was late and totally wrong Also towel heater was broken Shoddy and staff unhelpful Now at holiday inn in canning town so much nicer and cheaper NEVER EVER stay there again  A burger

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location makes transport an issue I booked well in advance didn t get a river view Felt like I was in a bit of a box   Atmosphere is lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bathroom needed refurbishing The bar prices were a little too steep   The location That they provided free tickets for the ferry to Canary wharf The price of the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The Manager We have had previously stayed here and had complained about a few issues we had We thought we would try again as the location was great for our trip Upon arrival we spoke to the manager who was on the desk for check ins My word if customer service was always like this there would be no complaints We were given a lovely room and he would personally make sure that everything would be to our satisfaction and he did So thank you for making it extra special cookies too How to look after your guests and get them back we have booked again for 2017 brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was too small and just one blanket The view was so bad we were looking on a parking lot it did not meet our expectations  The staff was really nice and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The front of house staff were very professional but not that friendly Would have been nice to have a hello and smile on the times we walked through the hotel and saw staff management   The woman at breakfast who wore the bunny ears was extremely friendly and definitely deserves a pay rise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We had to ask for the air condiitioning to be turned off in the restaurant at breakfast it was so cold our food got cold and I had to put my coat on which was ridiculous This was a big put off   A good choice for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Car park abit tight but can t be helped  Excellent service Fantastic food Amazing view a great weekend overall Plus the boat being included in the price definetely worth the money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When myself and my partner arrived we were first given our card key to a room that was extremely small very hot with a fraction of the river view I was extremely disappointed with this as not only was we lead to a very poor room but there was no champagne waiting that I organised as a surprise for my partner I was left quite embarrassed and had to go back to a reception immediately and inform them that the room was not what I expected and was not what I upgraded The lady confirmed the room was an Executive Queens Deluxe however I knew this was not the case as I did carry out a lot of research on the variety of rooms that the hotels offers when I upgraded the room to a maximum price I could afford Without arguing she immediately gave us a new card key for another room which thankfully we were very happy with Unfortunately another problem occurred in the morning when we arrived at the restaurant for our breakfast We were informed that breakfast was not included in our room I had to bring up the confirmation on my phone to confirm with them to be allowed in which again left me fairly embarrassed in front of my partner Bedroom Although our room did have a wonderful view the bathroom was very small The bathroom tap was leaking and from what we could see this was a problem in the room for quite a while as the bathtub was fairly green under the tap The bathroom was very hot and stuffy and there was no vent   Firstly arriving on the riverboat ferry from canary wharf pier to the hotel s private pier was very impressive with the beautiful views of the river Thames and surroundings it was definitely a great start Our view out the room was superb We had the Executive Deluxe Queens Room that overlooked the River with Canary wharf into the distance The restaurant for breakfast had a very wide option of different foods ranging from a fry up to fruit yoghurt cereal pretty much anything you can think of was there The restaurant was big and very well decorated busy but well organised

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Travel distance to the city centre is about 30 mins by river ferry but the travel distance is outweighed by the experience of traveling up and down the Thames to get the hotel A swimming pool would make the hotel the ideal place for a family to stay in London   Great hotel and staff Free river ferry across to Canary Wharf was a great treat for the kids Playground outside the front door was a pleasant surprise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I think the breakfast was very overpriced We booked a room that didn t include breakfast as I thought we d see how much it was when we got there Almost 20 each is very steep which is why we went elsewhere for breakfast once we checked out   The whole hotel was absolutely amazing The decor and style was fantastic the rooms were really clean and had everything you would need for your stay The free ferry across to Canary Wharf was also great and provided a great link to more pubs etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our room was very cramped as it had a sloaping wall and the window was on that so the curtains just dangled all night and I m the morning the light shone in far too Much and you couldn t close the curtains as if the wall position   The bed was comfy to sleep on and We lloved the fact we could collect the boat right outside to cross the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We booked a King Double as a treat for my wife s birthday and emailed this to the hotel hoping for a room with a nice outlook of the Thames but got a ground floor room overlooking the car park front entrance with the smallest bathroom ever it was a bit like the Mrs Brown s Boys under the stairs toilet sketch easier to reverse in than walk in   Nice and easy for the O2 arena bus stop right outside C10 to Canada Water in around 10 minutes and then 2 stops on the Jubilee Line

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No temperature control in room very cold in the bedroom and too hot in the bathroom  Very convenient ferry to Canary Wharf runs frequently at peak times

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Last morning no fried eggs chief was just cooking omelette but those who love eggs with their breakfast was disappointed went up checking with hubby several times but still none   Breakfast great choice Loved the ferry across the themes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Catching the boat to cross the Thames might be a bit annoying if you are not a tourist and time is valuable If you have time I would even say it is somewhat an attraction   I ve stayed in many hotels in London and this is one of my favourite It is an old industrial building renovated in the typical dock lands industrial style a lot of character rooms are nicely laid out bar is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing Everyone was so helpfull  The staff were amazing I had arranged to propose to my partner while staying at the hotel and they set aside the library area for us decorated it with candles put our music on a wireless speaker and also put lights on the balcony where I proposed overlooking the Thames Truly memorable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was a lot of noise and I wasn t able to sleep well due to the amount of noise the delivery vans were loud and I could hear the staff making noise from outside Found it very difficult during the evening to get a good sleep  The food was lovely the room was beautiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We got raw sausages for breakfast on the Sunday which we complained about after eating a few of them to the manager who showed the chef Was sick later on that evening and it really spoiled the idea of eating there again On the sat the breakfast was brill so was gutted on the Sunday Also a timetable for the ferry on the bed would have helped a lot as we were told on the sat last ferry is at 1145 but we never new that was only at the sat and not the Sunday so cost us 35 plus around 45 mins wait to find out it wasn t coming Also room 328 bath is cracked and gone rusty  We were blown away with our visit it was amazing the cocktails the staff and the rooms We re all really nice except bath

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Being charged 58 room service when we hadn t had any room service The charge was removed because the girl on reception couldn t find a receipt as there wasn t one But had we just have dropped our card in the express card box then this would have been debited from the card I used when we check in   Lovely relaxed atmosphere in the bar areas bar waitress staff nice friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Plug in sunk wouldn t open so couldn t use sink Reported it to staff at reception went out hadn t been fixed when we returned late that night Had to brush teeth in bath Was given discount   Bed very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing at all  The room was spacious with nice area to sit room was very clean bed comfy and a nice place to relax Checked in very quickly and is a lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The angle of the TV in the room as it could not be extended enough to watch it whilst in bed   Loved everything about this hotel The location was perfect Was nice and quiet in the evening with a lovely view of the city Definitely would recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the receptionist tried to charge me fifty pounds extra without telling ne untill i realised when entering my pin number the room was tiny for a queen size room and it felt likitwe was put in the abandond corner of the hotel no local shops just a small pub outside  the reception area of the hotel looked nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We booked a room on booking com with the idea of what we would have however the room we were put in wasn t anything like the one we had selected it had no view what so ever and the Windows didn t even open I was quite dissapointed with this as I had planned it for a surprise for my boyfriend and he wasn t impressed at all  The staff were very friendly and the place was very nicely set out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room and particularly bathroom was tiny Bed was very creaky   Great location for river views and ferry to Canary Wharf You get a bit more for your money than central London and the journey in was less than 20 mins by bus and tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hotel is fantastic throughout from reception to the bar rest to the bedrooms hotel is so clean and staff that were around were so helpful and always had a smile on there face service and quality of the food was superb location is great for the o2 and bars over the way by ferry ive worked in a 5 hotel for 14 years and travelled to a lot of 5 hotels and this is up there with them great hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Reception staff not understanding English which resulted in me being charged an extra 14 instead of credited 14 Took nearly 20 minutes to check out and we thought the issue had been resolved when we left but clearly not the case   Rooms very comfortable Bar relaxed and welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Surcharge  Should tell people there s a surcharge before hand rather then giving a receipt with with it added with no explanation we were not the only couple that complained

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Stayed in the Queen Guest Room and the views were amazing as they overlooked the docks Very peaceful out on the balcony at night and the room service was really good as well Would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Very expensive bar for fairly poor food our room was at the back so woken up to bottles being throw in to main bins every morning not a great location   Beds were poor rooms small and the bar closed to residents at 1am If you missed the last ferry it was a very expensive taxi back from the O2

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We could hear people leaving the lift in the early hours and in the morning The hall ways could have been updated a little to match the rest of the property   Comfy bed great views in comfortable surroundings The bar and terraces were great also We also appreciated the possibility of express checkout

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room service Requested replenish of coffee milk not restocked by morning maid Requested at 23 15 and told it would be 30mins as they were very busy finally arrived at 00 45 Next night trouble with safe Rang reception at 23 00 no one came to room so went to reception twice and finally around 00 40 told that there were no staff who could deal with it until first thing next day After chasing at 7 00 the same person who d been on duty the night before came at 7 15 and fixed it in minutes A stay here was an expensive treat for us and we had to go to work straight from the hotel it was not a restful experience   Great balcomy views of the City and over the river to Canary Wharf from the room Liked having to get the ferry across and seeing the beach as the tide came and went Breakfast staff very pleasant even when busy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had some problems checking my booking hence the upgrade I simply wanted to know if I could check in early and if we had two double beds as per the website The effort it took to find this out was less than good and spent 20 minutes talking to 3 people to find this out I even called the hotel and was told to talk to my travel agent Also had problems ordering some sandwiches and room service just after 11 An hour and half later we cancelled the order They waived the parking fee to compensate   Fantastic location and a lovely hotel recently refurbished We got an upgrade to a 2 room suite having had problems with the booking This room is normally 300 a night and t is easy to see why Two 6 double beds 3 TV s lounge area and shower room Room and balcony overlooked the Thames and Canary Wharf There is a free ferry boat across the river to Canary Wharf to the Clipper which runs to the centre of London and O2 Very convenient for all this Nice bar and restaurant with huge selection of options for breakfast We parked under the hotel too Will certainly stay here again for O2 and other Lady running the restaurant was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The heating in my room didn t work and it was cold seeing as I was by the riverside room  The views and links to other places the hotel itself is beautiful loved the boat services too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bathroom was a little small Found empty bottle of water in from which was discovered after a chair was moved  The complimentary ferry to Canary Wharf Very pleasant and helpful staff Bed very comfortable and spacious Good range for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Me and my boyfriend booked this for Valentine s Day and booked a king with a balcony I chosen this hotel as it was so close to the river and had wanted a room with balcony with at least a decent side view of the river in the booking I asked very nicely if it would be possible to have a room with a decent view as it was my first valentines I m originally from London and absolutely love the river when s we arrived the room we received was over looking a car park we were at least four rooms away from the view of the river from the side that was visible through literally a crack in between buildings I didn t even feel like we were next to the river at all I appreciate that there are many rooms but seeing as I had specifically asked very nicely and there were many rooms that were closer to the river even from the side or ones that over looked a a small artificial lake would have been fine but I may as well have been in any hotel in London the view was the opposite direction to all of the classic London sky line so basically could have been anywhere I couldn t help but feel very disappointed it s not like I was not willing to pay for a room with a decent view but this was the most expensive room that had a balcony this was my first ever Valentine s Day as I have never been in a relationship before and I can t help but feel like it was a let down as I had booked this hotel specifically for the view of my beloved Thames  The hotel in general was nice the room was clean and comfy the staff were mostly lovely but not very helpful the cash machine in the hotel was broken at the time and when I asked member of staff where the nearest one was I recieved no answer which left me and my boyfriend blindly searching for one on our own

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The rooms were really small The food was terrible and undercooked It was impossible to find our room We paid for a view of a car park Not worth the money at all   It was tidy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Parking was expensive and hard to get in and out of plus our TV didn t work Staff weren t too helpful   The bed was comfy and the decor was nice River boat was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: ist room no view covered windows no tv reception told staff no response till complaining again next day got a upgrade very happy also new pictures in dining area changed why not of history as before did not like heavy uncovered hot air blowers over doors had to dodge them  beds comfy made up every day breakfast excellent as always expensive if not booked in advance with a deal nice area free ferry crossing to other side a bonus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Just a shame about a couple little house keeping department issues but the way the staff sorted these out was a credit to the hotel and very professional   The location decor staff was amazing and services and staff are a credit to the hotel The staff really professional and always there when needed Excellent customer service and will now be my hotel of choice when visiting London in the future

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: we were in a room near the boiler flues in the car park so it was very loud at times The Tv signal was very poor which made it impossible to watch But this wasn t a real problem as we wer on a weekend away  The breakfast was great Staff were very helpful and attentive Room was very clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room had no heating the second room did but u couldn t turn the heating up so the room was still freezing U can hear the lift buzzer going constantly and room was very small and the bathroom was tiny   Comfy bed great view great choice for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The TV remote control didn t work The heating fan was too loud at night waking me up every time it started up   Bed was very comfy and every where was clean The hotel generously acknowledged my husbands birthday and honoured my request for a river view Nice food for both evening and breakfast Thanks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Not enough tea and milk in the room and maybe some biscuits would have been nice Didn t have breakfast we thought it was too expensive  The cookies though as my daughter has a nut allergy and alternative for her would have been good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The Tv was not working properly so couldn t get any movies   Great location food service was lovely and staff were very friendly definitely worth paying extra for the bigger room and view of the city I will definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: girlfriend couldn t see TV from bed but I prefer ed the view from balcony   great view of city and river small issues resolved by staff very easily nice big bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were on the 4th floor and the curtains in the room drove me crazy seems a small thing but the roof was sloped and the curtains were the wrong size so didn t block the sun light out and it didn t give me much chance for a sleep in   First time we have stayed in a 2 bedroom family room and it was perfect and really good value for London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room service too expensive for what you get  The room was lovely and the staff were very friendly Good facilities and nice location overlooking Canary Wharf There s also complimentary cookies upon arrival and a free ferry ticket to take you over to the wharf Would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was not as expected and although we had a river view it was out of a side window The sink in our room was super tiny but all furnishings were in good condition   Breakfast was included in the rate which was a nice surprise Extremely good spread

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Temperature in room and public areas could be better controlled Both were a little underheated  Great view from the room good breakfast Complimentary cookies were excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff upgraded room which usually would be great but upgraded to a king from a twin I was staying with my mum so I had to sleep on a camp bed   The view was great and I liked the free ferry across the Thames Staff left a little birthday cake in the room for my mum which was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: How small our first room was it did not look this small in the photo and was very disappointed However our room upgrade was amazing   View from the room Breakfast was great Staff were very helpful when we were not satisfied with our room and helped to upgrade us at a small price

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Just one staff member and only one spoilt the show short suited manager in Resturant efficious manner no smile no apology for waiting to be seated for breakfast   Amazing choice of breakfast Upgraded to lovely room overlooking Thames very grateful for this Very impressed with female manager in Resturant warm friendly efficient and professional lovely bright personality

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Everything is this hotel was fabolous From the warm cookie gifted at arrival to the transfer to the airport Nice staff wonderfull breakfast nice ride to London city trough the complimentarry ferry There is also a very nice pub close to the hotel some steps with nice food and beer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was freezing as considerable draft from the patio doors on the 6th floor We resorted to warming ourselves up with a hairdryer Hot water was turned off and we were told about this by a letter outside our door We were unable to shower before we left   Nice hotel with great views Nice ferry service too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The boiler was broken so the room did not warm up The water was cold and we were told in the morning that we wouldn t have water from 10 00 13 00 The managers were very helpful and compensated me for this  The bed was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The rooms were Okay Just like in the picture Bit dark in decor My son remarked no toothpaste no hairdryer and I was disappointed to find no tea or coffee in the rooms just bottled water Maybe that was because we had the lowest priced room   The Location What can I say Amazin Felt like a proper holiday on an island with the free ferry service and water all around and the walkways over the water The outside terrace could have sat there all night with it s view of Canary Wharf and the blankets Sat in every seat in the bar and the library up the stairs with the two fires view of Canary Wharf and outside balcony Proper plush The decor was really indulgent and comforting for us Good food in the restaurant too Coffee terribly expensive nearly a fiver but okay for a treat was Costa The free hot cookie on arrival was a blessing Bought a tin

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: salt pepper in open bowls instead of cellars unhygienic like mintballs in an indian restaurant everyone delves in not all wash hands first lack of parking facilities no dressing gowns slippers positioning of tv on wall 90o to bed  view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: N A  Had a lovely weekend at the hotel The ferry was ideal for getting to the tube stop and the hotel was everything we wanted and more Great value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The heating was difficult to control either too hot or too cold the bathroom wasn t very nice the river view on the ground floor was obstructed   The ferry was free to the other side of the river the breakfast was amazing lots of choice tasty staff helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I was told I would have a queen room with a view I was on the bottom floor with a view of the car park didn t like that and was put in the smallest room wasn t happy  Was in a great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Every thing was good no negatives  The room was lovely Massive comfortable bed Room was nice and warm we visited in February The staff never ignored you every one spoke

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing really apart from the slightly on the expensive side food and that 11 30 is the latest water taxi over from Canary Wharf if you fancy a late night drinking spree that said there is a great bar in the hotel itself   Everything was great Food was excellent if a little expensive breakfast is fantastic staff are very polite and helpful the gymn is great rooms were very nice and clean and the bed was more comfortable than mine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Service in Resteraunt very slow Booked through Booking com no information given ref free ferry to hotel poor instructions on how to get to the accommodation   Clean comfortable bed room Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff were courteous and helpful We had a number of queries and they listened and provided us with useful information When we asked for a specific issue to be rectified it was immediately and without fuss We would particularly like to thank Helen the Duty Manager who dealt with us on Friday 19th February 2016

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room cold No additional blankets or pillows available Bed very hard and uncomfortable Poor view   Breakfast great Plenty of choice Breakfast staff nice very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Walked in room and curtains had fallen down They sent someone straight away to fix it but wasn t offered alternative room or anything Rooms very hard to find with different lifts and block layout Felt v much like converted 60s council flats Got a deal for 100 but definitely wouldn t pay top rate for it River bus useful but Canary Wharf station much further walk than indicated on site at least 15 20 mins Bar and restaurant quite upmarket room service extortionate with plate charge DoubleTree brand much better in other locations Leeds is beautiful   Car service brill much cheaper than taxis Super comfy bed and very quiet room with balcony and river view Bargain if you can get a room for around 100

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only draw back was that there isn t enough parking  Everything was lovely the staff were very helpful and approachable Would happily stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bar was very expencive nothing to do around the hotel and fire alarm went off at 1 in the morning on Valentine s Day was not impressed  Nice hotel pretty clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No heating in the bathroom Breakfast not included nearly everywhere includes it these days The bar charged 16 a GLASS for red wine   Bed was comfy no traffic noise great view over the Thames Free ferry over to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I loved everything the receptionist was amazing He offered us cookies and was very approachable and lovely The view was great We had everything we asked for There is a bus stop just where the hotel is which allowed us not to struggle to find transport towards victoria They offered us ferry tickets for free All the staffs were amazing they are the real MVPs Loved it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Unfortunately this visit was poor Our room was very small and in the loft area room 417 even though I had booked a King Guest Room this was appalling and although fire alarm test was planned Wednesday morning at 11am we had 3 tests undertaken with the alarm siren in our room Very upsetting visit this time round   Been at Doubletree Hilton riverside few times now and venue and location is ideal and nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our first night was spent freezing in a room with no heating We made several complaints After receiving extra towels and a thin blanket to stay warm finally the manager came with a portable heater He was very apologetic and we did receive a discount room transfer for the second night and complimentary breakfast However the first night was very uncomfortable due to the lack of sleep and temperature I have recently been very unwell and being so cold all night was certainly not ideal

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room could have been abit more cleaner The wait to get checked into the hotel was very poor I was waiting for over an hour even though I was told the room was ready we was just waiting on the keys   The room was nice and I liked the fact we was able to use the ferry The staff was friendly and the view was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The wifi wasn t free in the room according to my girlfriend I didn t use it and stuck to 4G The room was really nice but in the booking it said we d receive a city dock view and we faced the opposite way it wasn t too much of a big deal The room itself creaked LOTS The doors and floorboards from our room and the surrounding rooms creaked and the bed was although comfy hard to settle in because it was by far the creakiest thing An alarm did go off at 11 30pm which was incredibly loud We didn t know what it was but it could have been because the heating was up We had no warning this would happen and it my girlfriend was a little shook by it   Friendly staff and a great atmosphere It was welcoming and felt sophisticated but relaxed The room was incredibly nice and decorated well Free warm cookies on arrival is always a good thing The free ferry trips were incredibly useful and saved us time and money giving us more time to discover little areas we knew nothing about

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The organisation of this place was ridiculous Was given the wrong room in fact we had entered a room that was already occupied the ticket for room service wasn t taken and the toast on our breakfast wasn t even toast it was bread Absolutely disgusting They kept giving us the wrong keys for the rooms eventually after 45 mins we was put in the right room not what we had chosen but it did   Nothing it was awfawl

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was much smaller than I imagined especially the bathroom I also had check out at 2 00pm but we had the cleaners knocking at our door at 9 00 in the morning saying they were here to clean the room We informed them that we were not checking out till 2 00pm however we had another cleaner knock on our door at 10 00am for the same reason and again we explained we were not checking out until 2 00pm   The view was beautiful and the design of the bedroom was nice The staff at the reception were really friendly and I liked the free complimentary cookie that was warm

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The cookie they gave the moment we entered so that we atleast feel good about the cookie if not anything else Our stay was horrible They were not cooperative or welcoming or value for money Very rude expensive for no reason Youll find better places to stay in london this is a warning dont go on their rates its a sheer dissapointment

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: That dinner was one price was a bit too much if you just wanted one meal but menu was set   Hotel was lovely nice atmosphere and liked the ferry to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The breakfast wasn t the best but parts of the breakfast was great and it was free due to a mishap with rooms so it made it even better I also think they should have a little more for there guest to do   The room and bathroom was nice the bed was extremely comfortable and view was beautiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Booking in and checking out could of been less of a wait but other than that we had an enjoyable stay  Size of the suite was excellent and the view was amazing Catching a ferry across was a really pleasant addition to our stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The heater didnt work The room was very small and the location was horrible From canary wharf i had to take a taxi which cost 20   The food was decent and the staff were quite welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room wasn t as it appeared in the picture I was shown when I booked Couldn t see tv from the bed They took 50 extra from my bank account for each night we stay incase I decided to use the hotel services   Room was v good Free free crossing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The temperature of the shower could have gone up slightly higher but that is all   Everything about this hotel was perfect I went with my boyfriend for a weekend away for Valentine s and the service was impeccable really friendly staff who were attentive and would go the extra mile View from our junior suite room was excellent Thames view beautiful Room was clean a big comfortable size bed was very comfy Complimentary breakfast and executive lounge with canap s and alcoholic and soft beverages throughout the evening Will definitely stay here again Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Did not like to first room we were allocated you could feel the springs on the Mattress after complaining we were upgraded to the New side of the hotel  The 2nd room we had was perfect comfy and spacious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We arrived quite late to check in and were quite tired from a day walking around London We got to the room and it was pretty nice until we started noticing small black hairs all over the place We ran a bath and just before getting in noticed a number of these hairs floating in the bath Then went to the sink and more hairs there Went to phone reception and to my surprise there was even hair on the phone Reception didn t answer despite a number of calls so we ended up having to go back to reception to complain We were given a new room but this isn t really ideal at midnight when all we wanted was a relaxing bath and to get to bed The staff seemed too used to dealing with complaints and even at this time there was a queue at reception where we overheard a few more complaints   The view was nice and the rooms although small were nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was cold bed was uncomfortable woke up at 6 15am by banging which was unloading of a Lorry outside our window Breakfast was messy and not a lot left at 9 00am

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location could have been better They should also provide a more frequent ferry service on the weekend Also the lighting was really dim and dingy in our room and the glass on the Windows doors were frosted so didn t let much light in   The bathroom was really nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was no hot water in the morning resulting in cold showers The rooms were very small a lot smaller than expected from the picture The bar was massively over priced Paying 23 for a 7 bottle of wine   The overall d cor was nice and it was all very clean and the staff were nice and polite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room want as clean as expected it was smaller than expected Heating in the bathroom was so hot and unable to switch it off Bed want very comfortable Have to get a boat to and from the hotel to Canary Wharf which we didn t not know about prior to our stay Also the television in our room was so poor half of the channels didn t work   Costa coffee in the hotel reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I thought I had booked the hotel near the Tower of London so was disappointed when we arrived The hotel location was quite a distance from any sightseeing places and with the ferry that takes you across the river finishing at midnight we felt like we were on a curfew Our rooms felt like loft conversions with slanted ceilings not great with a 6 4 husband and you could feel and even hear the springs in the mattress so no sleep for all the wrong reasons Our alarm went off on the final evening of our stay with no explanation whatsoever To top it all off the towel rail was positioned behind the bathroom door so sprang back every time you opened the door causing injury on the last day to my arm   The breakfast here was lovely and the rooms were clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The first room we was given 1 out of 5 radiators worked which meant our room was freezing very small room considering price we paid We got moved to another room which was also very cold We arranged for breakfast to be brought to the room the same as many couples at the hotel and after waiting an hour our breakfast did not arrive and didn t think the overall service was acceptable for a valentines weekend stay at a Hilton hotel   The hotel itself was lovely great location food was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Generally nothing Loved every minute   The hotel was excellent Excellent boat service helpful staff fantastic room We had a brilliant stay Would highly recommend it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Was supposed to be a junior suite and it didn t even have a mini bar Staff charged me for the room twice on top of a 100 deposit Staff I spoke to were rude and dismissive Wouldn t stay here again   View was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A bit difficult to get to and from Quite expensive Deluxe king room a bit small Step into bathroom a pain   The bed was very comfortable and the view was amazing The staff were very friendly and the food service in the restaurant was exemplary The steak was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The reception area was very cold and the corridors weren t clean i e 1 2 eaten apples in the ice machine wine glass on the floor in the lift coffee cups on floor in corridors These stayed there for hours as passed them numerous times whilst walking too and from the room Shame the communal parts of the hotel didn t match up to the rooms   the novelty of the boat ride friendly staff Rooms were lovely Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was very cold and it could not be fixed Staff brought the extra heater and asked me on the last night if they could compensate it The location is very deserted   Staff going extra mile to solve the problem Nicely decorated old building

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Parking a little on the experience side but then again it is London most probably about avarge   Decor of the hotel comfy and well equipped rooms Ferry across the Thames from the hotel to Canarie wharf for free

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only downside we encountered was that the bed although very comfy was extremely rickety and creaky I woke up on numerous occasions during my stay due to creaks and groans everytime me or my partner rolled over   The staff very extremely welcoming and the food and drink in the restaurant was beautiful Also the added addition of complimentary ferry tickets completely rectified the isolated position of the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Getting back to the hotel late at night was very tricky tried to attempted to ring the hotel for a taxi but went round in circuls with the options on the phone so gave up did ask for some flowers and bubbly in the room as was a birthday weekend but didn t receive this and no reason as to why  The breakfast was beautiful as so was the staff xx the bed was lovely and comfortable to

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Use softer toilet paper what they used was awful There ya go I ll take my own next time now I know  The huge bed and the room We upgraded and it was lovely The only bad point was when we upgraded the receptionist said the room overlooked the river it didn t But hey ho it was a lovely room anyway

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff didn t answer the phone I called the Careline three times and each time gave up and were not very informative Hotel is not so easy to reach though the free shuttle boat service is good   Breakfast was very good Big choice of food once we found it Room was comfortable if small

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Took a while to get to the central London but not their fault I suppose   The bed was comfy loved the free ferry service and lovely welcome when going into the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was super super small 140cm not a cm bigger and we couldn t get a room with a bigger bed So the sleeping part was terrible   Great location with parking nice view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fact that I had wasted my phone bill and rang customer services straight after I had booked the hotel room asking for a small favour to make that one night very special for my girlfriend as it was her 21st asking if they could give us a room with a good view or anything nice and on the phone they did say they will book us into a good room with a nice view but when we got there they had given us a room with a backyard view and very Denced space I wasn t happy at all I had to make the effort to ask if they could change the room which they did but not what I expected for me this was very embarrassing Overall The fact that I had rang customer service and had it planned 2 weeks before the arrival and still walking in to something completely opposite to what I expected Not happy   N a

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing   Loved this hotel nothing was a problem for the staff Rooms were small but clean and comfortable especially the bed it was extra comfy I have to mention David in the Columbia bar excellent customer service and always smiling

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: For a hotel in this class one would have expected a mini bar or at least a fridge in the room An outside seat and table on the balcony would have been a bonus   Fantastic riverside location with idyllic ferry service across the river Only 3 minutes from Canary Wharf Comfortable room with a view Excellent breakfast Friendly polite and efficient staff Bus service C10 right outside the door to Rotherhithe and Victoria

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A better view as requested prior to arrival The full English breakfast charge is extortionate 20 for a breakfast And the boat service to Canary Wharf finished at 11pm on a weekend It would be a lot better if that ran later on weekends at least as people want to go out   Cookie on arrival Professional staff and comfortable room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The fact that the hotel cannot guarantee an early check in and when you re travelling a long way to get to your destination it s not ideal to have to wait until 3pm to get in a room you ve missed all your day nearly   The hotel is in a great location A ferry ride across the Thames from the hotel s pier to the Docklands pier and you re ten minutes from the tube to get you where you need to be We had no problem with parking the car as the street outside the hotel has many spaces for people to choose from or you can pay the 12 and park in the hotel s car park The hotel room was clean and comfortable so no complaints there We had a room up on the 4th floor but it didn t matter to us We didn t eat in the restaurant but the food looked really good Overall we had a great weekend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I d have liked a little more detail on the travel around from the hotel as we walked a long way from Rotherhithe Overground train in the cold when it would have been easier to go to Canary Wharf station and take the ferry across to the hotel which is free   Comfortable bed good views of the Thames from the room Great boat service to Canary Wharf once you know its there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Using the boat to get to Canary Wharf was great especially when it s free to residence   We stayed here 5 years ago and the hotel was tired since then they have done a great job in sprucing it up into a lovely hotel It s great to be a bus boat and tube ride away from most of the destinations

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I wish we got a Cookie when we left   Love the free river boat to Canary Wharf was the highlight of the stay Also love the cookies on arrival to the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The soap provided had dry suds on so it seemed like the bar of soap has been used before   Free ferry service was excellent They let us into our room 3 hours before official check in time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Tv on wall perpendicular to the bed so not watchable when in bed and only one comfy chair with suitable TV viewing Booked for a river view but had to lean over the balcony to see the river from our window   Bed was very comfortable and spacious Shower great Nice warm cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room bathroom although comfy clean was a litle to small for my liking but nevertheless warm cosy   The location was excellent we also enjoyed the free river boat trip across to the shopping centres attractions Breakfast was a bonus too with a variety to choose from

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The whole hotel is clearly tatty and slightly tacky The hallways the doors the woodwork in the rooms are that old dark brown stained bashed up wood used in seedy cheap B Bs around the UK They have pipped an artificial sickly sweet air freshener via the air conditioning which makes a dreadful noise when on into the corridors and bedrooms Truly nauseating if not a health hazard The shower bath very narrow and difficult to climb into for a shower and slippery had rusting taps and mould between the all the edging The towels and flannels were actually shredded The beds were so creaky you daren t move for waking people up And you could hear everything that was going on in the neighbouring rooms Oh and finally if you are into all things brown this is the hotel for you Not at all what we expected for a so called 4 star hotel Shame on you   The area around Surrey Quays is an interesting area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Corridors plain narrow dark and a bit intimidating My room in no way could be described as feature as had been expected re the booking info It was a box with unfortunately an uninspiring view of the main entrance Ferry a nice touch If you want to get anywhere quick though transportation is a little cumbersome  The location opposite Canary Wharf was inspiring with a good view from communal areas Nice hustle and bustle about the place though with an overall relaxed out of city centre atmosphere Very unique in it s style plus Hilton high standards Arrived late but stress free check in and nice cookie touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Have stayed here before and would happily stay again The staff go out of their way to help you and an I love the complimentary cookies on arrival The ferry taxi makes it so convenient for getting in and around London with Canary Wharf station just a 5 minute walk once you ve crossed the river Lovely views day and night from the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We decided to spend a little more and have an executive room we were slightly disappointed with the basics   We have stayed there several times we love the location and everyone is welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No shampoo in rm No hot water in the morning Being a vegetarian at breakfast the vegetarian sasauage tasted like rubber and cold I suggest someone to taste them

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bins rubbish area was outside our window and even with it closed you could hear the trolies banging quite early   Loved the free cookie when you check in Room was gorgeous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: n a  loved this hotel really comfy bed tea coffe facilitys a free ferry ride from the hote to restaurants and shops on the other side of the thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Reception staff very rude TV in room broken Asked four times for it to be fixed was still broke when I left Room service very expensive   Breakfast had great variety friendly staff The free boat crossing was great as the hotel wasn t in a good location for travelling to London city centre

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Couldn t turn the air conditioning down so was too Hot at night also requested a water front bedroom to actually get there and have to pay 25 pound more than was told   The breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Damp smell in corridor and claustrophobic feel of particular room I stayed in and couldn t see outside  Style Ease of access to facilities relaxed atmosphere warm cosy room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Heating unit too loud but telhey provide a seperate heater All was ok  Customer service The quality of room The room size Comfort of the room Definetly worth staying in the suite with river view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: loved the welcome and the cookie we had early check in which was much appreciated room service was great the ferry service was awesome and they kept the ferry open later for us highly recommended and will be back soon

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the staff when we first got there were useless the tv did not work  the manager pauly christian was amazing really helpful and upgraded us after a horrible day made us feel really welcome room was really spacious and breakfast was fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No free wifi throughout hotel  Hot chocolate cookie on arrival Free ferry tickets which we used to get to Canary wharf then tube to O2 Very comfy bed Great views Bus stop right outside hotel Good breakfast First hotel I have not been wakened by other guests doors banging or noisy lifts

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I was initially given room 052 which was right next to the main entrance so the traffic noise woke me early on the first morning When I complained I was moved but that room had no hot water the following morning Had to take a cold shower as I needed to be at an early appointment Apparently there was no hot water in that part of the hotel   The ferry across to Canary Wharf was smoothly operated by friendly helpful staff Breakfasts were well prepared with plenty of choice
