Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Everything was good  Staff were very helpful and cheerful Breakfast was cooked very well with an excellent selection Restaurant and bar staff helpful and welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The walls are really thin and it s quite noisy didn t get the best nights sleep however beds were comfy  Lovely room good location and nice views of the Thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: that you only get 60 mins free wifi in certain areas The rooms can be expensive and having wifi avaliable all round would make this hotel even better for people  Loved the warm cookies Although we didn t get them on arrival but as soon as we made staff aware they apologised and handed them to us The organisation of both the hotel boat and the clipper from Canary Wharf was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff came across a little rude trying to rush us through check in Maybe as there was a que but still we had travelled for over 2 hours and it didn t feel very welcoming We only had 2 milk sachets in the room so when we returned from an evening at the o2 we went to reception to ask for more milk so myself and my partner could have a drink from the room facilities but it seemed we interrupted a conversation between 2 members of staff I Felt uncomfortable On departure when checking out the receptionist did not tell us about stairway in the building down to the Carpark so we went outside and found we couldn t exit the way in which we had arrived as the metal shutter gate to the car park was down This wasnt down on arrival down the ramp So we came back up the ramp into reception to be told of a stairwell in the main reception going down to the Carpark then after going downstairs we found out that you need a coin to exit the Carpark which we were not given After returning upstairs a second time and feeling rather annoyed after having to que and ask to get the coin it all felt very unorganised   The location I can t fault it was excellent great view and comfortable beds although I wish we were told about the free ferry it would of saved us a long round trip to the O2

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The heater in the room didn t actually heat up so the room was quite cold at times Also it was difficult to close the wooden shutter because the heater got in the way But overall they seemed quite minor   The room was very similar to the photos on the site lovely decor and spacious It was a nice surprise that we got a free ferry ticket for the duration of our stay The welcome cookie was also a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I had difficulty connecting to the wifi as I couldn t figure out how to connect to it and when I tried con aging the restaurant on our room phone nobody answered   Very friendly staff and a free room upgrade with a beautiful view Also found the free ferry tickets extremely useful and the hot cookie on arrival was just an added bonus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bar was a good place to sit but there was a cold breeze so too chilly to be comfortable for long   I enjoyed the short ferry ride to the hotel the room was very clean and staff were happy and helpful Close to Docklands bars and restaurants A little tricky with travel in to town but not too bad once we d worked it out A

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 35 minute wait to check in receptionist did not relay much or relevant information forgotten to give us water taxi tickets advise of facilities or where anywhere was located heating wasn t working so reception was freezing was 1 degree outside no heating in room quickly got moved to another hotel location far further than stated from tube stop   Free water taxi across to canary wharf quay complementary cookies and waterwatered arrival great rooms good taxi service from hotel cool bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When we arrived at the hotel the room that we were given was not as described I was promised a river city view but all we could see was the flats opposite so we asked to change rooms The second room we were given was beautiful and had a lovely view The room was clean however the toilet had not been flushed The air conditioning was on full blast in the middle of January and couldn t be turned off We had to get a maintenance man the come to our room to switch the system off completely The room was still freezing so we had to get a radiator sent to the room We found the staff quite rude When we called reception about the air conditioning there was no answer My partner went down to reception and asked why there was no answer and the woman shrugged her shoulders and said I don t know   The room in the hotel was beautiful the view was lovely and the room all in all was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were left standing at the bar and other customers came after but got served first and we were due to check out at 12midday but the maid knocked and came in our room at 11 then again at 11 40   The rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: the bed was pretty hard  Location was ideal for travel in to London with 2 different buses a stones throw away from the main entrance and a ferry going from the hotel to canary wharf scenery was lovely at night with all the skyline lit up from the buildings on the other side of the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The facilities are poor They have had a refurbishment and there are many problems if you stay on the Wharf side I wouldn t stay there again and regret my booking with this hotel Approached staff and Hilton customer services with regards to no hot water poor water pressure noise issues but no solutions Very poor   Thames Ferry docks at the hotel Great link to the rest of the city as nearest tube is a good 15 minute walk via parks Wouldn t walk this at night obviously

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Great location and love the ferry back and forth to Canary Wharf Our room was fantastic with a view of Canary Wharf in the evening We had a free upgrade on our arrival too Beds and really comfortable room was a great size all clean and tidy Fantastic time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We didn t get the room we had booked we had asked for and paid for a river view and ended up not getting a view at all The heating didn t work the television did not show the main channels the hair drier didn t work   The location was perfect for what we wanted

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The shower sprayed water all over the bathroom when used They did provide you with extra towels for the floor   The great free ferry service from their dock to the other side of the river The room was large and spacious The staff were very helpful We had a view of the river which was a lovely surprise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I ordered room service pizza chips and some noodles I had to wait for over an hour for this When I finished you was told to leave the plates on a tray outside your door which we did it was very dangerous and the corridor was very slim but that wasn t my main concern When walking to breakfast the next morning me and my partner walked in a private room next to the elevator mistaking it for the stairwell and in there was the tray with the plates and leftover food on I have photo evidence The room was clean but bits were obviously rushed and missed there was what seemed to be a pubic hair on the telephone and long blonde hair in the bath I have brown hair overall it was an average hotel to stay in nothing like it makes out to be I recently stated in the hotel In Leeds doubletree which was amazing and is the only reason I went for a Hilton doubletree again Very disappointing  It was very convenient that the hotel offers a free boat to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Location was a bit tricky to get to charged an obscene amount for two sandwiches and some crisps Kitchen closed at 11 but we ordered foor at ten to and were told it was closed Cold Tesco sandwiches x5 the price was massively out of order   Beautiful room lovely hotel free transport over the river for guests

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: If I was being hyper critical the service in the restaurant was a bit inconsistent   Lovely hotel Amazing value though I did book as part of a January offer Very comfortable and would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room service turned out to be a bit more expensive than expected as well as the wi fi in the rooms   Very good location out of the center of London quiet Transport was quite easy Clean rooms and warm atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Checked in and agreed to a standard room instead of the river view room that I had booked and was willing to pay for The room is uncomfortable noisy area of the hotel kept thinking someone was going to come into our room Was disturbed when having a bath with men knocking on my door wanting in to service the bathroom when I was still checked into the room Drilling began at 9am each morning Never told when checked in that needed a ferry ticket luckily had my oyster card but was 2 70 to get across when could of had free trip if the hotel had of told me Checked out with my bill expected it to be paid on that day and not 7 days later the hotel now take the money leading my bank into overdraft Look elsewhere Yes it s nice hotel but really not worth it   Ferry from the hotel to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I m not sure that it was the faults hotel but when booking this for New Years Eve through Booking Com I was led to believe I had booked the Hilton beside Tower Bridge We therefore had planned out entire day thinking we was in another part of London when in fact we was the other side of the river This caused a few issues as we had tickets booked for the theatre a restaurant booked for the evening and even tickets purchased for the fireworks all on the South side yet we was no where near any of this The hotel is lovely yet very disappointed with Booking Com as their description of the hotel is not up to date there is no swimming pool and the king suite does not have a kitchenette nor does it look anything like the pictures they are advertising   Clean spacious lovely breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I have booked for an riverside room however I had got the most smallest and horrible room ever I have been advised by Booking com that I had booked for a riverside room but when I get to the hotel after 3 hours of driving it was a terrible mistake to go through booking com you have let me down You should get for what you pay Terrible

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It was quite difficult to find the right elevator for the right section where your room was located It was like a rabbit warren or a maze There wasn t enough staff on at reception causing long waits for service  I liked the fact that you could take the ferry over to Canary Wharf It was delightful to walk over there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We booked a deluxe queen room with a balcony and they gave us the key to a 2 single beds room and no balcony Complained at the reception one of the members of staff was absolutely useless however a gentlemen got involved and managed to find us a room better than the one we actually booked for the same price   The view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Poor ventilation in our room and No mini bar Expensive wifi 15 per day for wifi in room is a bit too much   Excellent view from restaurant Amazing breakfast and loved that frequent complementary ferry to Canary warf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff had the cheek to tell me the queen size balcony rooms were unavailable Offered me a double supreme room and said that it was more expensive than my originally booked room but won t charge me extra A little research later and I find out that it is in fact 40 CHEAPER Poor service sly methods of money making and staff who lie On top of that a room I had booked 3 weeks prior is unavailable No one offered to carry our bags either   Clean hotel nice cookies on entrance

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hotel was quite out of the way as the tube station was quite a walk as we found out with bags in tow There is a bus service which runs from Canada Water station to outside the hotel which was useful but next time I would rather stay more central as we spent a lot of time travelling in and out 20 95 plus a 5 tray charge for breakfast was rather extortionate however it was nice   Rooms were nice clean and modern Staff extremely helpful and ferry service useful The outdoor seating area off the bar is fantastic on the Thames and over looking Canary Warf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I booked a smoking room as an essential part of my stay with the intention of smoking my last box of cigarettes ever with plans of giving up for 2016 so my partner and I arranged to do it in style only to arrive at the hotel and be told they have never had smoking rooms We decided to stay anyway since we had made the trip trying to park was also an issue as the shutters did not work so I had to leave the car and walk back in to inform staff who let us in manually I believe we checked in at 10pm and checked out at 12 30 because what I had prepared myself for in terms of smoking my last box of cigarettes ever became much more stressful than I had anticipated so much so that i had to check out and we deemed it better to go home rather than stay in the hotel room   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff advised breakfast was from 7 we got there at 730 only to be told on New Year s Day it s 8 We weren t the only ones I ll advised   The building and travel desk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: A little out the way for tube services as its either a long walk to canary wharf or a short bus ride to Canada water however the river bus service made it reasonably easy and added a little extra to our trip  Great staff lovely breakfast and clean rooms yummy cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 3 friends travelled and we each booked a room would have liked the rooms to be adjacent to each other or at least on same floor   Decent price for London complimentary ferry to take customers across the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I am probably a bit picky since generally it was very clean But could just do with a deep clean ie corners etc   Staff were great did their best if we had a problem always ready to accommodate Really friendly and helpful made us feel welcome Thank you Great with kids smart hotel but not too posh that you are scared to let your kids run around Things were made easy for us with kids It was a good balance The location was ideal since located in quieter side of London but great accessibility to tube ferry About ten mins overall to get to the jubilee line with kids obviously faster without kids Breakfast options were great beyond what we expected Great choses for kids too We would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The noise from the staff sorting bins outside our window woke us up At breakfast staff told us they never expected this many people but surely they should have as u need to pre book  It was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The check in was very slow only 2 people on reception and the hotel was full We checked in and then had to queue again for nearly 15 minutes when we returned to collect our key   The hotel was nice and comfortable boat service was very reliable and easy to use

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: even I ask them a room on high level the room I stayed was on ground floor and also definitely different from the picture on Booking com hallway gives off stinky smell   The view from the room is really awesome

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I fell in the hotel which resulted in a broken ankle and 4 hours in St Thomas s missing out on all booked surprises I think staff should have been more supportive then trying to diagnose and offer taxi to hospital which cost us 25 I slipped on carpet in the bedroom  We had difficulty locating hotel maps and directions sent were poor quality On arrival a member of staff did her best to sort out the problem for us which resulted in a discount a the end of stay Good helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff never answered the reception phone and were not overly friendly A long wait to check in as only one desk open   River boat shuttle cookie on arrival and hotel appearance design

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The problem was the boxing day tht 25 12 and 26 12 there was no boat transport and 25 12 general no public trasport and almost everything closed but that doesn t have to do with the hotel   Everything

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The walls are so thin we could hear the people next door and the people in the hallways conversations very clearly almost word for word This made it very difficult to almost impossible to get a good nights sleep This was a very disappointing way to end an amazing trip   We loved the view of the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: They charge for tv channels didn t say any thing befor if you wach sky it s extra charge dis casting they charge me 39 pounds for no region they shod tel customer befor tarm and condition bad sarvices

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Further from central London than I thought but river taxi service was good   The hotel was clean and comfortable the breakfast was very good service as well staff were friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Toilet was blocked during our stay and a few holes covered up in the tiles in the bathroom  The views from the balcony looking over the thames was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was not well laid out There was no windows in the Queen bedroom just a frosted door which when opened led to the fire exit Probably not the easiest place to stay if traveling into back and forth from the hotel to central london

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Paid the room at the start of the week When checking in another 100 was taking and we were not made aware of this It was later explained when I asked about it The next day my bank ring fenced the payment so I was 200 down and not told I explained I had bank charges because they did not have me sign anything upon checking or even explain the process First room given was not what I paid for it was not until I raised a complaint they changed this

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hotel is very isolated unless the ferry to Canary Wharf works for you I chose the hotel because Booking com told me it was only a couple of miles from the venue in Wapping I was spending the evening at It didn t point out there was a bloody great river in the way and the taxi fare to get across was about 40 so the need to use bus and overground meant I had to leave before the end   Modern hotel nice view across the river to Canary Wharf although my room wasn t facing that way Warm cookie on check in although I had to remind the receptionist

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Customer service was awful at check in nobody seemed to know what was going on Service was also bad in the bar took ages to get served several times We asked could we order food 3 times It was only when I got angry that they bothered to take an interest Food was nice when it eventually arrived   Room was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Didn t like the disorganised parking facilities and having to return a key card before leaving for the day Didn t like where the TV in the room was placed as it was impossible to watch in comfort  I loved the welcome and felt a valued guest

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing oh except the bar prices are a bit steep but then it s a 4 star hotel in London   Friendly accommodating staff Relaxed atmosphere and cosy room with floor to ceiling window balcony and great view over the Thames Lovely breakfast Got the Guest of the Day award of a bounty bag of snacks Nearness to south bank and best bits of London Near to a Thames Clipper boat station Or can walk to Borough Market in 50 minutes without stops Looked as though the place has been refurbed since our last stay Very warm and inviting bar and restaurant areas Good sandwiches in bar in evening with chips Shame the pool has gone but then we would not have time to use it this visit anyway

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Drinks at bar were very expensive unfortunately  Loved the welcome cookie and the ferry tickets were a nice touch This hotel is exceeded our expectations and was very easy to get to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: treatment from other staff had to wait a long time for room to be ready was told Queen Riverside view Got a double bed and a view of a wall Costly and no different to a Travel Lodge Premier Inn  The concierge on arrival was a nice guy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: wifi is not for free and the hotwater has something wrong in 1 morning and happened when I was showering cold to die and altough the ferry is good but still a little bit borning in the evening   the bed is awesome and had very good sleep there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bed is not very comfortable shower need a bit more power The food at the bar was average but rather expensive and I did not like the fact that service charge had been added without asking  Location Room decor General decoration

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Lack of information in reception about car parking the receptionist wasn t sure how it worked costs etc   The room was very spacious comfortable and clean Location was excellent with free access to the ferry Nice views to the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Not a fault of the hotel just make sure you know how to get to the hotel if arriving by tube   Great location for meetings across the river at Canary Wharf A ferry runs from a jetty connected to the lobby Super night time view from the bar terrace

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Dreadful dingy corridors small rooms tiny bathrooms bar manager and his staff rude and ignorant Reception staff not very pleasant Hilton really dropped the standard in this place Breakfast was overpriced factory canteen food Disgraceful  Ferry to Canary Wharf and Costa coffee in the reception That s it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Member of staff told us we hadn t paid upon checking out when we had paid upon arrival Charged twice for stay had to ring to get money back Maid walked into our room before our checkout time without knocking   Location is good and ferry service very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I hated the bed and the fact there was soo much noise during the night I could hear the room next for taking a shower The bed was ver uncomfortable and squeaked at every turn   I loved the location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Just a little niggle the bathroom radiator did not work so a chilly start to the day And the mattress needs replacing   The staff location and ferry service were excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The hotel was very quiet and the service was good The location was good too Had a king room with a great view over Canary Wharf Had access to the executive lounge which was a good place to get away from the hustle and bustle of the bar The ferry service was really efficient and regular Easy to walk to town if you wanted to The breakfast was really enjoyable I would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I loved the free warm and delicious cookies on arrival they went perfectly with tea in the room The hotel was beautiful and the suite we stayed in was very comfortable with a gorgeous view of the river and Canary Wharf Room service was quick and delicious with every thing we needed We felt right at home

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We were charged 11 for a can of lemonade and a small bottle of juice to take to our room We ve also never paid so much for a latte   The rooms were beautiful and the complimentary ferry service was fantastic Staff were very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Beds lumpy balcony had broken brick work so could not open door as had our 2year old son with us very disappointed  Fantastic location bar restaurant buffet breakfast all brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: room was not ready when I got there even though I had requested early check in but got free upgrade on my room   Fantastic view from the balcony in the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The matress was really worn out and springy   Location was great nice vies how ever our room had frosted glass so could not enjoy the views Staff friendly and appreciated the complimentary ferry ride to and from the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was smaller than expected and there is no way the bed was a queen size It was ok for one night but in not sure if I d stay again as it was a bit of a trek to get to the hotel   The guy at the check in desk was lovely and made very thing easy to understand

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I did not even get to visit the hotel as i only realised today i booked the wrong dates Called the hotel said to speak to booking com as i booked it on the 11th for 27th November but looking at the booking was for 22nd Nov Called booking com and spoke to Natalie she called the hotel and said they cant do anything as passed the date I feel that is wrong when someone clearly never visited the hotel why would you charge them 153 00

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our TV didn t work I m sure if we d asked it would have been sorted but as we were only staying a night we didn t bother Shame it wasn t checked beforehand though The main issue is with the wifi The code didn t work in the room and we had no phone signal I really think such a massive hotel chain should provide free wifi in the rooms   Love that you get cookies on arrival at Doubletree Hotels The room was surprisingly spacious considering it was the cheapest option It was also nice and quiet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: ferry across the river became a bit of a chore after a few times bathroom was a little cramped long walk to the nearest tube  good breakfast nice view from the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Good sized rooms and good facilities within Had a lovely meal in the restaurant in the evening and excellent choices for breakfast Good for us getting to and from the O2

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Cheap toilet paper Nothing within walking distance had to wait 45 minutes for the ferry to pick us up from Canary Wharf a 3 minute trip not sure why the ferry didn t just go back and forward as and when required   Great view Very comfortable bed and bedding Nice bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room was small with no real windows bathroom towel rail electric cables loose uninsulated and looked pretty dangerous bed was rock hard and very noisy couldn t find any wifi that worked   Location was good on the street parking was free outside the hotel was ok breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hotel was lovely Staff was lovely Location was a bit far from where we wanted to go but that s my fault for not looking at the postcode properly but it s easy to get around The beds are soooo comfy Recommend the queen size and the cookies are lush too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Night staff not great gentleman at the front desk struggling with English   Room was great Breakfast was great The room had an amazing view out over the river Canary Wharf and was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The taxi company you use for your hotel guests is a rip off How they can justify charging me 20 for a 3 mile journey early saturday morning when there is very little traffic is a joke The driver didn t know where he was going and kept hitting the curb Rubbish   Lovely comfy bed I was upgraded when there was a slight problem with my original room Great showers great view helpful staff very quiet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It was not convenient for the attractions and the nearest tube station involved a bus or ferry trip Too far out from things and nothing in the immediate vicinity shops etc   The staff were really welcoming and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: No minibar cant use balcony at all but there was a huge supplement Difficult to find taxi Hotel taxi Costs 25 to ExCeL Did not refill free water in the room had it only on arrival   Comfotable bed and pillows Helpful staff at reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I requested for a Thames view Something we didn t get Also request for a birthday surprise which was not done either Expensive for one night Bath was blocked so water kept over flowing Complimentary cookies were given before we left not when we had requested the nigh before   Comfort of bed and breakfast was delicious Staff were friendly Boat service to Canary Wharf is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I stayed at this hotel as a surprise birthday for my fionce I had to arrive early as I had a birthday cake which needed to be put in the refrigerator The staff especially Mirko were very helpful When we went out for dinner the staff put the cake in my room which was a nice surprise for my fionce when we got back I d defiantly stay here again The view from the room was amazing of Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Photos on the website do not match with the reality completely You got charged for the hotel extras upfront and if yoy don t use them then you get refund but it s taking few business days already No mini bar The terrace is not there No matter what room have you booked you just get random one with a view to parking lot   They give you free cookie upon arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Loved everything about it Easy access to the 02 arena via the Thames clipper We were back at the hotel 30 minutes after the concert finished Breakfast was excellent big comfy bed Hotel was spotlessly clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Creaky floor bathroom abit small and lighting not the best   Bed was big and comfy Lovely furnishings and balcony is a nice touch Views are gorgeous at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room not cleaned properly Found a woman s undergarment in my room Was stranded in London due to fog at airport and was unsure when my rescheduled flight would depart A member of desk staff was quite snappy and discourteous to me when I asked to stay another night They could not accommodate me   Very comfy beds super breakfast and gym

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The bed was rather small We had reserved a King Guest and the description suggested a large double king size bed The bed was a small double Room 187 Requested a river view and overlooked a car park didn t really matter as the weather visibility was poor   The hotel was very good v good breakfast and nicely furnished

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Leaving to go home   Such helpful staff and we got upgraded for free as soon as we got there as a surprise Amazing place to stay Lovely bar and gorgeous room and views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The narrow double bed in our room We assumed that being a Hilton hotel it was a queen size bed  Riverside location though from our room the river view could not be seen

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Had to que for breakfast then breakfast hall was very crowded Expert that a hotel of this standard would we able to supply wifi   Very Nice and helpfull staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Televison didn t work some sockets wouldn t take plugs river view was actually of a car park main light in room wouldn t work  Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Utter waste of money you book something and they give you a random room no Wi Fi no parking   Don t book room here Regardless if what you book wither delux or with balcony they just give you a small random room with no view no balcony

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I emailed to find out about the ferry to get to the hotel but received no reply I called to check and the person I spoke to told me it was complicated to get from the tube to the ferry so recommended getting the bus It s actually very easy to get to the ferry from canary wharf The room was okay but as I have found with lots of these rooms on booking com in London they are huge rooms that the hotel really has trouble selling or need upgrading and don t really represent a deal as such   View from the terrace and outside bar area and breakfast Ferry to canary wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff are untrained and inexperienced 2 big events on in the area O2 concert and World Cup Rugby and there were not enough staff to cater for all the guests well enough Poor communication and badly stocked bar no Guinness Insufficient food to fulfil the menu   Rooms are comfortable and staff are friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The size of the room for what we paid was quite small There was no main light or floor lamp in the room so in the evening it was quite dim The mattress on the bed was not comfy you could hear and feel the springs again for the money you expect more  The location of the hotel was excellent the water ferry was very convenient and it was great to use the river rather than just land transport Balcony in the room was a plus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The tv didn t work we had to psych 50 per payment which was not mentioned before hand  When s liked the balcony and the room size including our bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Didn t have a working television There was no hot water On complaining in the morning reception staff said boiler was faulty didn t really help our predicament Breakfast not worth the price   Beautiful setting on the river Was able to sit outside until late into the evening as blankets and patio heaters were provided Bedrooms ideal lovely comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The length of time it took for us to actually check in was ridiculous I had always been told double tree are great hotel and give you a cookie on arrival where as this wasn t something we experienced on our stay but did see others had which isn t great service also we had booked the king suit and this looked nothing like the pictures there was no telephone in the room to call down reception and we was on the 6th floor 8 staircase so as you can imagine this would have been useful also the hotel added 10 on to our taxi fare and we wasn t made aware there was an additional charge for the hotel calling the taxi overall I was disappointed I wouldn t choose a hilton or doubletree again I would recommend a Novotel   I liked the fact there was a free ferry ride over to canary wharf the included breakfast with the stay was worthwhile

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Noise from adjoining rooms upstairs children running round banging doors   Wonderful view excellent room and facilities Clean and tidy Could not have asked for more

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: room not ready at 3pm fro check in Room very dusty Breakfast chaotic and dis organised  The room was tastefully decorated Some of the reception staff were excellent choice of breakfast and quality was above expectation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Some of the rooms on the ground level are a little bit older than the rooms on the higher floors from my experience with this hotel   Good value for money in the off season During summer the rates can be a little on the higher end as it is considered a four star hotel The staff seem to maker an effort to give customer service based on HIlton standards

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing apart from the bath plug needed a bit of maintenance  The welcome when we arrived after midnight The view The ferry ticket The lovely breakfast The quiet room Every member of staff was cheerful and pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Being given the wrong information about what level my room was on   A unique experience of the Canary Wharf skyline at night great room with desk etc the breakfast is excellent as are the waiting staff who serve and want to help guests It was a pleasure to be served by polite staff I will always check out this Hotel everytime I am in London henceforth

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 1 TV installed at 90 degrees to bed weird 2 Room over car park very noisy most of the night 3 Toilet seat broken 4 Chair broken 5 After complaining they agreed to move us to another room and agreed to move our luggage When we returned late on Sunday night they had not moved our luggage and seemed confused 6 Breakfast at 21 pounds was cold pre fried eggs and hard bacon 7 Summary while staff seemed eager to please there seemed to be a general lack of management  Spending two days in London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I booked a bigger room with a balcony and had to settle for a small room without a balcony   The hotel was beautiful and very modern The food was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The only thing that I would point out is that the room was cold and there were no instructions for the air conditioning system We stayed cool   We my 10 year old daughter and I arrived late and tired having got ourselves lost on Canary Warf and then missing the shuttle ferry The young man at reception was delightful updgraded us and cheered my daughter up with warm cookies Breakfast was lovely we didn t have the hot option but really enjoyed our fruit yogurt and croissants

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff were acting funny because we wanted a refund as we didn t get the room we booked for After 20mins of going back and forth we were offered a suitable room offering city and river views   I liked the bathroom mirror which was perfect and bed so comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: TV was positioned terribly in the room Shower had been bodged so water went everywhere when first turned on   Breakfast Nutella muffins Bath was nice and big Bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The room was quite a way from the main reception desk   The hotel was very clean and modern and the room was beautiful with a fantastic view We were given a free upgrade on arrival as there was availability

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Asked for a balcony with a nice view Received a room without a balcony altough paid for one Had to change rooms once changed really disappointed with the view from the room which was over a car park and of the housing building next door Made the stay so unromantic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: False advertisement on the pictures of the room The picture outlined was not what we got in the end I didn t like the fact we had a stone wall in our room was extremely cold Fire alarm was set off due to a guest smoking in their room even though it states on booking com that you can have a smoking room we were stood outside for 10 minutes because we weren t allowed in the building When we eventually got in the ambience was very cold no one to greet us no music no heating all staff approx 10 were running around like headless chickens unsure of what they should be doing when in fact should have made all guests aware of what was happening We were then told that we would be charged 13 for parking our car I refused to pay and the concierge waivered the charge which we were grateful for The room itself needed a re vamp Hard bed old furniture with stains on even the food menu was covered in red wine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: It wasn t like other hiltons rooms were ok   There was a problem with our room and the supervisor upgraded us and provided excellent customer care

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: restaurant extermely crowded hotel team was not prepared for having many guests long waiting time for breakfast and dinner   good location nice view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The rooms are very small for a 4 star hotel and you can hardly move around in their bathrooms   The Breakfast and accessibility to transport was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: When you don t know about the ferry coming from City Airport it is a bit of a hassle to get there DLR Underground Bus   Great location very near Canary Wharf and excellent connection with the ferry

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Room definitely not like pictures Completely misrepresented Website showed nice balcony had Juliet balcony also misrepresentative 1 curtain was hanging light didn t work tv didn t work fridge didn t work Etc etc etc etc Had a kid one bed suite with a normal size bed come on who puts a normal size bed in a suite Due to small bed and snoring I had to sleep on sofa Left a day early couldn t take it  View was terrific

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The service at breakfast wasn t very good the staff sat us down and didn t explain How the breakfast worked we wasn t offered tea or coffee we sat down wondering if we could just go up to the buffet or if we had to wait for a waitress we then had to get someone attention to get a tea and coffee  We loved the location of the hotel we think we would of struggled to get to the hotel if we didn t have the use of the ferry so this is very convenient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Firstly our room we booked wasn t the one we was given Bathroom was tiny view wasn t what we booked river view our room looked at the bar restaurant Charged me 50 pound extra even though the receipt showed correct amount my bank statement says otherwise Poor hotel all round will not use again   Being in london

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Restaurant food was disappointing and some staff were welcoming As a single woman I didn t want to sit in the bar to eat but was not allowed to order from the bar menu and be served in the restaurant One of the more expensive places I have stayed in the area and the least satisfying  Reception staff were friendly and helpful Moved me to a quieter room with out any question

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff were very slow to respond to calls from the room room service response in particular needs improving need also make sure all room facilities are in place and good order  Very good sized room staff very friendly and good location for Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The ferry over the river is difficult to find when you first arrive on canary wharf side When you eventually find the dock there are no clear directions Not particularly good when you arrive late in the evening very tired Also TV in room was not working so having arrived late and unpacked we had to pack up again and be moved to another room The hotel sorted it quickly but inconvenient having to be moved all amenities should be checked prior to arrival to avoid this   The room was very comfortable clean and spacious Just a quick trip over the river to the hotel Welcomed with a warm chocolate cookie Value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Car parking facilities inadequately explained Phones not working in two rooms Room standard booked was not provided and had to be changed New room was not to the same standard as booked 24 hour room service not as described in brochure i e nothing other than supermarket sandwiches after 11pm When ordered not delivered Both rooms had broken desk drawers Flaking paint plaster in stairwell With the exception of one member of staff attitude and advice from staff unhelpful Radio did not work   One member of staff was actually helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I booked a queen suite however was extremely dissapointed to find the bed was only a double I confronted reception who offered us free breakfast but no offer to put us in the correct room At breakfast the service is shockingly bad We sat out on the terrace and i had to go looking for for cuttlery and glaases for drinks when people inside were waited on at tables Would never reccomend to anyone   The location is good as is the free ferry over to canary wharf The room was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The location isn t a massive problem and the majority of the time the walk to and from the tube station was quite nice However when in a rush or carrying bags it s much worse and having to wait for the boat can be quite frustrating   The foyer and the bar were well designed and the rooms were too The sound of the waves washing up on a morning were a particularly nice suprise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast on the Sunday was very busy 600 people staying at the hotel We turned up at 10 00 and we had to queue for a table and then we had to queue again for a cooked breakfast Not enough staff to cope with the demand which resulted in uncleared tables no plates and glasses at the food stations and not very happy customers Though once you got your food it was very good with a wide selection on offer Location was a bit too far out for central London but once we located the right tube line at Canary Wharf situated within the shopping centre which is a bit of a maze we managed to get into Covent Garden   The area the hotel is situated in is very nice and the view from our balcony was lovely Hotel very modern with a free ferry to take you across the Thames to Canary Wharf though if you want to get back around midnight you need to double check the crossing times

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Step to the toilet   Very efficient staff Room excellent though very dangerous step to the bathroom Breakfast chaotic as not enough plates etc Beautiful views and great free ferry

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Food was burnt Had to wait an hour for someone to pick up the room service phone Housekeeping walked in on me twice Once when I got out of the shower Our bed was broken They gave us a room with a small double instead of a queen sized bed This hotel took nearly 400 out of my account for a 1 night stay which was only 135 and was extremely painful to get back Dreadful establishment

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Couldn t sleep because of a fan that couldn t be switched off Moved to a new room Found some hairs in the bathroom No toothbrush or toothpaste Charging for Wifi in 2015 what the   Staff tried to make up for things

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast service seemed unprepared for number of guests wanting food at 10 15 and a longer than normal wait for a complete range of hot food   Free ferry across to Canary Wharf and river transport into central London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The staff are not warm or friendly The stare when a god evening sir is expected I understand it s a British hotel and the rudeness is complimentary but it is an American chain I expect better manners  The style of the hotel and location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Our room didn t look over the river and for what we paid this was a disappointment but the bar seating area outside was open till late which made up for this   The staff in the Columbia bar were more then welcoming having a laugh with us and other visitors It was lovely to feel so comfortable The free ferry was also a huge bonus so that we could go over to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: In the past if I ve booked a docklands hotel it s usually walking distance from Canary Wharf I booked this hotel in error this hotel should be titled Hilton Surrey quays not Hilton docklands as this was misleading Our taxi driver which cost us a fortune as the boat was on a break said a lot of people make the same mistake On arrival the reception had no record of our booking luckily I had my paperwork and email on me however they had no record of me bringing my children even though I remember I had to input their ages when I made the booking To be fair the hotel rectified this and put my husband kids and I in a very spacious 2 bedroom suite My parents however mum was celebrating her 60th birthday were put in a tiny room overlooking the carpark and was kept awake till 3am with crowds leaving the hotel and car doors slamming Lesson learnt Read the address of this hotel don t just look at the title and assume   Rooms very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bit of a shambles getting seated and served for breakfast   Mentioned was anniversary And they made us lovely cakes and gave us a great view Lovely cookies and pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Called reception several times no answer Breakfast awful very disorganised dirty food areas no glasses had to find waitress to ask for tea or coffee lack of food Squeaky bed  Room was clean great boat service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Staff money was taken from our account by the hotel without our say so we didn t use room service or anything our bank is now dealing with this  Room and hotel was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Creaky floorboards squeaky room doors corridor doors slam hot water takes 5 minutes to come through nowhere near a tube station no view the layout of the hotel is shocking even the staff haven t a clue which lift guests should take took me 15 minutes to get to my room with the help of three staff members Somehow my auto generated rating of this stay was 3 8 no way I d give it 1 for cleanliness   Clean and modern room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: I did book a room on boking com a day before but for some reason it never went though so had to rebooked was 50 00 more can t get the same room I wanted The breakfast is very cold the sausage was revoting I thought as a english sausage would be a good british one but no can t eat it at all   the new beds people in the bar area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Upon check in we got a card for 60 minutes of free wi fi For any more we would have had to pay This seems ridiculous to me Everyone has free wi fi these days I m willing to pay a little more for nice things at a nice hotel but paying for wi fi in 2015 is just too much   Everything was very clean and looked very nice The staff were all friendly and professional Room service was a reasonable price for room service There was a wide selection of food for breakfast everything I had was delicious Our room was spacious and comfortable The bed was one of the most comfortable hotel beds I ve slept in almost as nice as my own

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Nothing bad to say  Carolina on reception was really welcoming She arranged for us to change our room so we could have a river view and we ended up with a bigger room which was grear The warm cookies on arrival were a lovely touch Breakfast was vast and really tasty The C10 bus which goes from Canada Water directly to the hotel was really useful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Check in very miserable staff same on check out with a 10 minute que room was good had everything we needed but we didn t sleep most of the night as the bed was awful very time you Moved you could feel and hear the springs in the bed The pillows wear lifeless This really ruined out stay at the Hilton As we were very tired the next day we came for a treat for our wedding anniversary and said we would have come back for a celebration we have later in the year but the uncomftable bed and no sleep as put us off   Location and free hopper to docklands

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast was by far the worst that I ve experienced in some time Completely disorganized and chaotic Buffet dishes not stocked food not restocked no orientation directions given by staff My table was even given away to another guest after i initially sat Also on check in no attention had been paid to my advances requests  Brilliant location and exceedingly comfortable room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: The heating on our room was extremely loud all night to the point I could not sleep I called reception but the phone was not working also so I had to go to reception in pjs which was quite a walk away I was told there was an issue with the heating and nothing could be done other than a refund of 25 of my room rate I had to call to chase this up and not even 20 of what I paid was refunded   Complimentary water taxi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Breakfast could be more organised Nearly finished cooked breakfast by the time tea had arrived though cooked breakfast was ate fast as only luke warm   Views of London great from the hotel reception and bar areas Cleanliness and lovely d cor in rooms and reception area and restaurant etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Parking was a bit difficult Quite a walk to tube station but there is a bus service   Room very pleasant and comfortable Breakfast good Staff helpful Attractive riverside location Good value for the quality in London Surprisingly quiet at night Would definitely recommend and go there again

Full_Review: 1 All 4 pillows on bed very soft Perhaps consider providing 2x soft 2x firm pillows which might better suit majority of customers Or have the 4 soft pillows on the bed but leave a couple of firm ones in the top of the wardrobe to use as needed 2 Plates for cooked breakfast all stone cold plate warmer required   Polite friendly staff Excellent riverside location courtesy ferry across to Canary Wharf Clean well presented room well equipped Quiet location virtually no traffic noise so very relaxing

Full_Review: The bathroom was so small that I was hitting the toilet seat with the door to get in Sink very small and ended up splashing water all over the floor Bed also felt like large single bed rather than double TV connection was poor with very poor picture quality Horrid and glary room lighting with very unpleasant colour for the LED reading light At breakfast we had to wait for ages to be given cold cappuccinos Would not stay again   Not much but I have to admit the room was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: At check in we were given key cards They did not work as the receptionist had put an incorrect room no on card so we had to return to desk to query I found your quality of toilet paper poor for such a hotel of its standard It was the same quality that one meets in some public lavatories cheap non absorbent paper which is very thin and requires several layers to work efficiently   We have stayed before and the Hotel is very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was a horribke horrible smell in the room it was horrible we were told when we arrived that we have to have an adapted for disabilities room we said we did not want that so we had to wait for half an hour for a normal room we then tried to phone reception about the smell and it just kept ringing no answer The bedsheets did not look clean drinking glasses were dirty it was freezing cold I was very disappointed as it was not cheap I would rate the hotel 2 and a half star

Full_Review: Large and sprawling you can walk a long way to get to the bar It is also a bit out of the way for mainstream London visiting Saying that the ferry gets you over to docklands quite quickly Hilton need to get with the times and provide free WiFi for all in the hotel   Once again the staff at Hilton were excellent When our taxi did not arrive the duty manager drove us to the event we were attending personally a nice touch This is a comfortable hotel with good facilities and we got a very good price on the room for London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: There was a confusion with room service and our door number and our pizza and sandwhich s took over an hour to reach us so when it did it was cold We requested a taxi to be called from reception they said the earliest any taxi could get here was a 45 minute wait when we had somewhere to be We requested on the phone please could you call us if it arrives early we will come down 10 minutes before it s due We waited and no taxi came We then had to que for a further 10 minutes to speak with reception who did not take any responsibility and we explained that we needed to be somewhere and we were made to feel in the wrong A lovely taxi driver picked us up and explained there was not a 45 minute wait on taxi s Leaving us to miss part of our venue and feel very disappointed with the service   Lovely room and view very happy with location

Full_Review: Everything was perfect and convenient nothing disliked at all I would definitely come back  The staff were absolutely lovely and so friendly Loved the fact we got free boat service to Canary that was excellent The bed was super comfy after a tiring day had an amazing sleep and the view was extremely beautiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside

Full_Review: Location was further out to travel into centre of London than used to This made meeting up with friends a little long winded with buses tube All manageable but would need to think of somewhere closer in future Room was well presented the bed was not comfortable at all and didn t sleep well with air conditioning issues that were resolved by reception next day   Was a lovely hotel with views over river The free use of the river boat over to Canary Wharf was a great thing to have use of

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Aircon not adjustable unpleasant smell in room but not too bad that I could not stay in   Room comfortable tea making facilities iron and board good bed desk After a complaint about aircon and smell in room I was given a free breakfast quite unexpected breakfast was excelent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: 1 It took a while to check in at reception as all the details was not received from Booking com apparently 2 One reception staff unhelpful when confirming that I asked for a special request She said that it was not on the system until she was asked to look again and then it was there 3 The window stills in the restaurant was dirty while eating at the window it was quite visible 4 Customer s children spilled food on the floor and it was not cleaned the whole time we were having breakfast Staff and guest just crossed over the mess 5 No swimming pool 6 Room very costly when I booked 7 It was my 10th wedding anniversary which I choose to celebrate at Double Tree and I was told that wine or fruit would be sent to the room but received nothing   1 The fresh cookies given at the reception 2 My room was changed with no problems 3 The bed was super comfortable 4 The views and balcony was fab 5 Very spacious room in the Deluxe King size 6 The staff particularly in the restaurant were friendly and helpful particularly Francis she was such a happy and welcoming lady

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: We thought the hotel to be a really good place to stay We did have a little difficulty understanding couple of the staff but they were still good The bar and dining area we found to be really nice well designed and pleasant to sit and relax there are several lovely terraces to relax and or eat by the water The rooms were also good and clean

Full_Review: Yes I did had a slight bad experience I wasn t booked into what I chosen on line The room given was one or two down in it s standard Still awaiting a proposed gesture from Duty Manager as a compensation   The location and the view scenes within and around the hotel was exciting and excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Free wifi was only for one hour and this was a continuous hour rather than being able to access wifi for a few minutes at a time  Lovely hotel great view helpful and happy staff Very comfy bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bad points are staff only seemed to be member of staff on front desk meaning I had to queue to sign in Came down in morning and asked guy on reception when next ferry was free service he took a while to find out surely he should know then when I got off other side I got stopped and asked for a ticket The guy should have told me I needed a ticket when I asked him the times I obviously wouldn t have thought I needed a ticket as it s a free service and literally goes from the hotel to other side of river it s not as though you could have jumped on half way The woman insisted I proved to her I stayed at the hotel it s the only place I could have come from she wouldn t call them for me to check either Also apparently the maid barged in on my boyfriend even though he had shouted to say he was in there and not to come in   Lovely setting nicely decorated quiet and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Sunday night water taxi finished too early meaning we missed it and had to go back to canary wharf tube and go through catching tube and bus back to hotel Should be highlighted that sunday night is not as late as normal weekdays Our fault for not checking but all the same would be helpful if there was a special notice   Position overlooking the thames Free motor taxi to canary wharf General surroundings

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Bathroom was very small The room had a sort of maritime feel to it being next to the river which was not really to my taste The television was in an odd location in the room Location of this hotel was remote for London Good for Canary Wharf but thats about it   Nice interiors Right next to the river with nice views from the room and restaurant Nice breakfast really good food Reasonably priced for London actually This is a good hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Hard to find from main road not signposted Surly uncooperative staff Unable to lock room securely one small bolt to outer door Noisy air conditioning system   Location close to Canary Wharf and free ferry across the river

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: In spite of the mass sporting event on the weekend and unlike the Novotel Cardiff The Hilton made no provision for an early breakfast for the large proportion of guests attending the event At the last minute water and bananas were laid on Considering I d paid a rate including breakfast I was aggrieved that the only way to get it would have been to pay 20 for a room service option   The Hotel was in good condition with helpful staff Room was a good size with lovely aspect and well designed As the hotel has been refitted into an existing Victorian warehouse the layout is rather chaotic with tight very narrow corridors and small lifts The lifts were only accessible by first using a flight of stairs Just to be clear though overall a satisfactory if pricey stay

Full_Review: Location Was out of the way of getting to the other side of the river once the boats had stopped at night Almost 100 in a taxi Also disappointing how hot the rooms were and the air con was limited to a certain coolness   Rooms were nice and clean and the staff were lovely Loved the free cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Docklands Riverside
Full_Review: Water bottles in our room were not replaced after the first night Had dinner on the rooftop terrace on Friday night We were escorted to our seat by a lovely friendly waiter however service after this was appalling We were asked by our waitress to provide a credit card as our room didn t have credit She then took my credit card away with her to keep until we had finished I didn t feel comfortable with this so I asked for it back from another member of staff after a long wait to find someone After our meal well about 20 mins after we had finished the waitress came over to the table to collect our plates lifted them up and set them back down on the edge of the table while she went to another two tables to serve other people without excusing herself each time cutting it short and ignore diners to move to the next table She then cleared an empty table and disappeared for about 15 minutes before returning to our table to remove the dirty plates We had to ask her for the dessert menu and the bill and ended up going to the bar to pay as she took so long getting back to us She seemed flustered and appeared to be the only one serving the whole terrace which shouldn t be the case on a Friday night Our bill was wrong as we had been charged higher prices for our food and drink than were stated on the menu This was resolved but took a while to sort This whole fiasco ruined our evening and took away from the outstanding food we received   The room was lovely clean and very comfortable with great views from the balcony Reception staff were friendly and welcoming Food in the restaurant was delicious Great ferry service to Canary Wharf

For me as I can t walk very far it was a little bit too far out It was walking distance to The Royal Albert Hall for my husband but as I couldn t walk that far we had to get a taxi  Breakfast was really good I liked the fact that they made your eggs to order The bedroom was comfortable and we had a bath with a separate shower which was brilliant for me as I am disabled

I had a spa The massage was lovely I was dis appointed that the mit they gave me to wash with had a hole in it and appeared worn out I could see all the damp along the skirting whilst I was having the massage The TV in the bed room was less then basic The information led me to believe that SKY was included There was not even FREEVIEW The picture quality of the TV was terrible  I had a spa The massage was lovely The staff were very helpful and polite The breakfast was very good and comfortable The bed was comfortable

We were put into a smoking room that smelled strongly of stale cigarette smoke I requested to be moved into a non smoking room Apparently there were no free non smoking rooms and I was offered a can of air freshener instead very professional A quick check on booking com and the hotel website told a different story ample free rooms I then spoke to a different manager who after a few minutes of searching upgraded us to a bigger suite The initial room we stayed in needed a lot of work and was shoddy to say the least Damp patches loose cable fixtures dirty carpets For a junior suite in a supposedly 5 star hotel I would expect more In saying that there were a few good things Location of the hotel is very food Breakfast was good Maybe I just got unlucky but after doing some more research and reading a lot of reviews I am not the first person to have had this massively disappointing experience A few words of advice for the hotel Please inform your potential customers when they are making the booking whether the room they have chosen is smoking permitted or not Do not offer the guest a can of air freshener as a solution to the problem Under no circumstances should you lie to the guest about the availability of rooms or lack thereof in the hotel Kindest regards Patrick  Location Breakfast

The cooked breakfast served in the room was old cold and unappetising Cold plates and covers The manager s response was to tell me he would have a word with the chef It still cost me 54 for two people The last night in the hotel an annual service check was carried out on the water system No water a bottle of water was left for drinks in the room in the bathroom from 10 30pm to 3am The noise of the water running through the system went on from 10 40pm to 1 30am It prevented sleep reading and was continuous and disturbing for almost 3 hours We were notified of the annual check by a letter left in the room which we saw when we returned at 8pm When I checked out of the hotel the following day and spoke to the manager about it I was told it had to be checked annually and he would put me complaint on my hotel profile I asked why if this was the case guests were not told when booking He did not have an answer Very unsatisfactory   The room was very comfortable and the area excellent for museums

didn t find out how expensive wi fi was until after making the booking satellite tv listed but didn t even get most freeview channels some channels didn t work could not access any movies or use hdmi cable to connect laptop did not work most electric sockets in the room did not work radio did not work etc   staff were very friendly and helpful bathroom was amazing the spa was even more amazing the rooms and decor were beautiful and a great size housekeeping service twice a day was nice it was a very luxurious experience except for the in room entertainment I would stay here again

The hotel cancelled our booking the day before Ignored emails The rooms Were not ready for 45 mins The room carpets were disgustingly filthy Fridge didn t work Someone tried to enter our room  Nothing The free glass of champagne perhaps

Bathroom extras shower cap etc missing empty boxes buffet breakfast on first day had no product available to eat and by the time fresh was cooked we missed our first meeting On second day breakfast was served cold which was a shame as it was well cooked Staff told us we were in the car congestion charge area and we wasted 20 minutes trying to pay for the charge to then be told by another staff member we were not in the charge area Staffs accents were hard to understand and some staff spoke no English at all We drank some cocktails they were very poor some of the common areas of the hotel bar and chairs in Resturant are very tired  Room very comfy quiet and great decor and smashing bed

Nothing  Everything From the moment we arrived the staff were friendly and welcoming They gave us all the options for parking which was helpful Check inn was easy and quick We were upgraded to a suite which was a lovely surprise Afternoon tea was delicious and so was the breakfast Lots of variety The room was clean We really can not fault them on anything Check out was ok

The room was a bit dusty and staff play from afar that means there is no one to ask if you need help Compared to other 5 hotels I ve been to The standard was a bit low   It was very nice and quiet way out of the noise Very relaxed Very convenient location easy access and nice eatery around

Terrible pastries and bread at breakfast croissants were dry and old toast was barely toasted Not a five breakfast at all Eggs cooked well but hash brown clearly from frozen Room felt a little cold and fusty bedding didn t smell crisp and clean although it did look clean That said the bed was very comfy and duvet soft Lack of facilities expected for five star hotel no pool or sauna and you had to pay extra for hammam They had recently painted the bathroom or grouted it and it hadn t been done very well white paint had gotten all over the marble looked rough and rushed The hotel was just a bit tired despite what I m sure would have been very grand furnishings in their day Needs some love and care to really hit the 5 star mark doorman fresher lighter warmer rooms and much much better food   Beautiful lobby friendly staff So sweet of them to upgrade us for our anniversary and they left a cheesecake really kind and special of them Very friendly check in and out service

Room service menu is somewhat limited and quite costly The excellent bar has a poor selection of beers and Scotch whiskies this should be simple to fix The cost of drinks in the bar is higher than usual for hotels in this range   Rooms are stylish and spacious and the bathrooms are superb The reception area is pleasant and staff are friendly

Extremely bad service in the last few trips Massive staff turnover poor in room service very poor staff staff training A C not working prop wrong times on clock welcome letter in room addressed to wrong client no service at lobby coffee mini bar never topped up missing coffee cup struggle to get attention of any staff Really disappointed   This place is going downhill and fast Have stayed here 12 times over the past 3 years and besides the room and bathroom size furnishings which are very good but otherwise worse than a 4 star hotel in every other way

Everything was really good The bathroom really nice Bed very comfortable Room service And afternoon tea were perfect Great location And professional service 10 10

It had a Faulty Towers quality Initially the fridge and kettle didn t work we wanted to make a cup off tea We found the problem to be the power point which had burnt out We had to look under the fridge and there was a whole lot of rubbish swept under there bottle tops etc Very off putting We called reception reported all of that and they responded quickly enough but missed the point each time sending a new kettle new glasses and finally a repair man The cleanliness issue was never addressed Once we experience an issue with cleanliness I m afraid it tarnishes the whole experience of the hotel and we experienced the stay as doing time rather than enjoying the hotel The decor was ornate but again a closer look and the windows were filthy and broken the gold and black marble spa bath was held together by loose panels of board the chair was wobbly and worn through to the stuffing lastly the breakfast was hugely expensive 22 we took the opportunity to enjoy breakfast elsewhere at a fraction of the price All up we couldn t recommend this hotel and I think it is the symptom of a bigger problem which is that London hotels get away with it not OK   The location is excellent
